title: Wave-optics imprints of dark matter subhalos on strongly lensed gravitational waves. II. Saddle images and detectability
summary: Wave-optics interference in strongly lensed gravitational waves is a new interferometric probe of dark matter substructure: a subhalo population threading a galaxy-scale lens imprints frequency-dependent distortions on the amplification factor of each macro image. In a companion paper (arXiv:2603.04267), we computed these imprints for the magnified minimum image. Here, we extend the calculation to the saddle-point image and we assess the detectability of the combined signal with the Laser Interferometer Space Antenna (LISA). Evaluating the amplification factor at a saddle is numerically delicate, because the equal-arrival-time contours are open and the subhalo signal is a small difference of large terms; we present a time-domain method that resolves it. Across a Monte Carlo ensemble of cold dark matter subhalo realizations, subhalos induce percent-level amplitude and phase modulations in both image parities, while the mean (de)magnification splits by parity: the minimum is net magnified and the saddle net demagnified. Demodulating the macro-image interference recovers the per-image modulations, and a matched-filter analysis that projects out the lens parameters yields a combined detection above $5σ$ in $62\%$ of realizations for fiducial massive-black-hole-binary sources of total mass $\sim10^{6}\,M_\odot$ at redshift $1.5$, provided the source lies close to the lens caustic at small impact parameter $y_{\rm src}\lesssim0.1$. Folding these naive per-event significances through optimistic strong-lensing rate forecasts yields $10$-$20$ substructure detections over the LISA mission. Strongly lensed gravitational waves are thus a sensitive, complementary probe of substructure at $10^{4}$-$10^{7}\,M_\odot$ scales inaccessible to electromagnetic observations.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜引力波中的波动光学干涉是一种探测暗物质次结构的新型干涉测量手段：贯穿星系尺度透镜的次晕群体会在每个宏像的放大因子上留下随频率变化的畸变。在姊妹论文（arXiv:2603.04267）中，我们计算了这些印记在放大的最小像上的表现。本文将该计算推广到鞍点像，并评估了联合信号在激光干涉空间天线（LISA）上的可探测性。在鞍点处计算放大因子在数值上较为精细，因为等到达时间轮廓是开放的，且次晕信号是大项的小差值；我们提出了一种时域方法来解决这一问题。在冷暗物质次晕实现的蒙特卡洛系综中，次晕在两个像奇偶性上均引起百分量级的振幅和相位调制，而平均（去）放大率随奇偶性分裂：最小像净放大，鞍点像净去放大。解调宏像干涉可恢复每个像的调制，而通过投影出透镜参数的匹配滤波分析，在基准大质量黑洞双星源（总质量约10⁶ M⊙，红移1.5）靠近透镜尖点且小碰撞参数y_src≲0.1的条件下，62%的实现可获得高于5σ的联合探测。将这些朴素的事件显著性通过乐观的强透镜率预测进行折叠，在LISA任务期间可得到10-20次次结构探测。因此，强引力透镜引力波是探测电磁观测无法触及的10⁴-10⁷ M⊙尺度次结构的高灵敏度、互补性探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：强引力透镜引力波是探测10⁴-10⁷ M⊙尺度暗物质次结构的高灵敏度、互补性探针，弥补了电磁观测在这一质量尺度的空白。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Iso-arrival-time (iso-Fermat) topology for three realizations, one per row, selected to span the range of subhalo detectability: (a) weak (sub-threshold), (b) strong, and (c) extreme cases (Sec. V.5 ). These rows are illustrative examples and are not drawn at random from the ensemble. The columns are the minimum (Type I, red cross; left) and saddle (Type II, red triangle; center) local panels and the global macro panels (right). All panels use the physical lens-plane coordinate \(\xi_{x,y}\) in kpc, with the halo center at the origin. WO (GO) subhalos are shown as filled (open) circles, colored by mass. For legibility, the scatter points show only the subhalos with \(m_{sub}>10^{3}\,M_{\odot}\) , while \(F(w)\) calculations also include the more numerous lighter perturbers down to \(10^{2}\,M_{\odot}\) . The green circle in each local panel marks a single subhalo whose removal lowers that image’s detection significance by more than \(50\%\) (a leave-one-out test, Sec. V.5 ). Such a dominant perturber is present only in the strong and extreme minimum and the extreme saddle, in each case a \(\sim 10^{6}\,M_{\odot}\) perturber within \(b\lesssim 0.01\,R_{s}\) of the image.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三个实现（每行一个）的等到达时间（等费马）拓扑，选取以覆盖次晕可探测性范围：(a) 弱（亚阈值），(b) 强，以及(c) 极端情况（第V.5节）。这些行是说明性示例，并非从系综中随机抽取。列是最小像（I型，红色十字；左）和鞍点像（II型，红色三角形；中）的局部面板以及全局宏面板（右）。所有面板使用物理透镜平面坐标\(\xi_{x,y}\)（单位kpc），晕中心位于原点。WO（GO）次晕以实心（空心）圆表示，按质量着色。为清晰起见，散点仅显示\(m_{sub}>10^{3}\,M_{\odot}\)的次晕，而\(F(w)\)计算还包括更丰富的较轻扰动子，低至\(10^{2}\,M_{\odot}\)。每个局部面板中的绿色圆圈标记一个次晕，其移除会使该像的探测显著性降低超过\(50\%\)（留一法检验，第V.5节）。这种主导扰动子仅出现在强和极端最小像以及极端鞍点像中，每种情况下均为位于像\(b\lesssim 0.01\,R_{s}\)内的\(\sim 10^{6}\,M_{\odot}\)扰动子。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: WO signal of the minimum image versus frequency, shown for \(50\) randomly sampled realizations: the amplification factor \(|F(f)|\) (top), the relative amplitude modulation \(|F/F(0.1\,{Hz})|-1\) (middle), and the phase modulation (bottom).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：最小像的WO信号随频率的变化，展示50个随机采样实现：放大因子\(|F(f)|\)（上），相对振幅调制\(|F/F(0.1\,{Hz})|-1\)（中），以及相位调制（下）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The same as Fig. 2 , but for the saddle image. The fluctuation amplitude is comparable to the minimum (parity-blind), while the mean offset differs.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与图2相同，但针对鞍点像。波动幅度与最小像相当（与奇偶性无关），而平均偏移不同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Distribution function of the amplitude modulation across 1000 realizations at \(f=10^{-4}\,{Hz}\) (dashed) and \(10^{-3}\,{Hz}\) (solid), for the minimum (blue) and saddle (red). The bars above the curves mark the \(68\%\) (thick) and \(95\%\) (thin) intervals, with a tick at the median. The three example realizations (a), (b), and (c) of Fig. 1 lie at the \(28\) th, \(92\) nd, and \(99.7\) th percentiles of the amplitude-modulation amplitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在\(f=10^{-4}\,{Hz}\)（虚线）和\(10^{-3}\,{Hz}\)（实线）处，1000个实现中振幅调制的分布函数，针对最小像（蓝色）和鞍点像（红色）。曲线上方的条形标记\(68\%\)（粗）和\(95\%\)（细）区间，中位数处有刻度。图1的三个示例实现(a)、(b)和(c)分别位于振幅调制幅度的第28、92和99.7百分位。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The same as Fig. 4 , but for the phase modulation \(\arg(1+\eta)\) . The (a), (b), and (c) realizations of Fig. 1 lie at the \(46\) th, \(96\) th, and \(99.7\) th percentiles of the phase-modulation amplitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：与图4相同，但针对相位调制\(\arg(1+\eta)\)。图1的实现(a)、(b)和(c)分别位于相位调制幅度的第46、96和99.7百分位。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Ensemble distribution of the net (de)magnification \({dc}\) for the two parities, oppositely skewed: a magnification tail for the minimum and a demagnification tail for the saddle.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：两个奇偶性的净（去）放大率\({dc}\)的系综分布，呈相反偏斜：最小像有放大尾，鞍点像有去放大尾。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Physical origin of the parity asymmetry. (a) \({dc}\) versus the local tidal strength \(T=\sum_{i}m_{i}/b_{i}^{2}\) , correlated with opposite sign for the minimum (blue, \(+\) ) and the saddle (red, \(-\) ); the opposite-sign correlation with a physical quantity ( \(T\) ) shows the parity (de)magnification is a real effect, not a numerical artifact. (b) \({dc}\) versus the macro magnification \(\sqrt{\mu}\) . The magnitude grows toward the critical curve, i.e., with increasing magnification.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：奇偶性不对称的物理起源。(a) \({dc}\)与局部潮汐强度\(T=\sum_{i}m_{i}/b_{i}^{2}\)的关系，对最小像（蓝色，\(+\)）和鞍点像（红色，\(-\)）呈相反符号的相关性；与物理量（\(T\)）的异号相关性表明奇偶性（去）放大是真实效应，而非数值假象。(b) \({dc}\)与宏放大率\(\sqrt{\mu}\)的关系。幅度向临界曲线方向（即放大率增加时）增大。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: How a dark matter substructure imprint enters a strongly lensed MBHB signal, for a strongly imprinted realization [the extreme example (c) of Fig. 1 , at the \(99.9\) th percentile of the detection significance \(\rho_{sub}\) ]. Top: time-domain strain of the two macro images about their respective mergers. The signal-to-noise of an MBHB chirp accrues over only the last \(\sim\) hours before coalescence, far shorter than the macro time delay \(\Delta t=t_{sad}-t_{min}\) (here \(\approx 36\) days, and weeks to a year for a galaxy-scale lens). Therefore, the minimum (blue) and saddle (red) are received as two cleanly separated chirps and can be analyzed independently. Bottom: the same signal as an amplitude spectral density against the LISA sensitivity curve. The coherent two-image transfer function makes \(|F_{tot}(f)|\) sweep between \(|F_{min}|+|F_{sad}|\) and \(\big||F_{min}|-|F_{sad}|\big|\) , filling the shaded band with a macro interference fringe of spacing \(1/\Delta t\) (inset). The WO subhalo imprint is the slow, frequency-dependent modulation of the band envelope , some four orders of magnitude coarser in \(f\) than the macro fringe, such that the macro delay and the per-image subhalo signal factorize. A frequency-independent (de)magnification would merely rescale the envelope and is degenerate with the per-image amplitude; only the envelope’s frequency dependence carries the substructure signal.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：暗物质次结构印记如何进入强透镜MBHB信号，针对一个强印记实现[图1的极端示例(c)，位于探测显著性\(\rho_{sub}\)的第99.9百分位]。上：两个宏像在其各自并合附近的时域应变。MBHB啁啾的信噪比仅在并合前最后约数小时内累积，远短于宏时间延迟\(\Delta t=t_{sad}-t_{min}\)（此处约36天，对于星系尺度透镜为数周至一年）。因此，最小像（蓝色）和鞍点像（红色）作为两个清晰分离的啁啾被接收，可独立分析。下：同一信号作为振幅谱密度与LISA灵敏度曲线对比。相干双像传递函数使\(|F_{tot}(f)|\)在\(|F_{min}|+|F_{sad}|\)和\(\big||F_{min}|-|F_{sad}|\big|\)之间扫动，填充阴影带，形成间距为\(1/\Delta t\)的宏干涉条纹（插图）。WO次晕印记是带包络的缓慢、随频率变化的调制，在\(f\)上比宏条纹粗约四个数量级，因此宏延迟和每个像的次晕信号可分解。与频率无关的（去）放大仅会重新缩放包络，并与每个像的振幅简并；只有包络的频率依赖性携带次结构信号。

title: LEGGOS II: A Strong Lens Model and Source-Plane Projection of the Clumpy Star-Forming Galaxy SGASJ111020.0+645950.8 at z=2.48
comment: 21 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to ApJ on May 5, currently under review
summary: Strong gravitational lensing by galaxy clusters combined with the resolution of JWST enables studies of star formation on ~10-100 pc scales in galaxies at z~2-4. As part of the LEnsing and Galaxy Growth: Observing Substructures survey (LEGGOS), we present an updated strong lensing model of the galaxy cluster SDSSJ1110+6459 (z=0.659), which lenses the clumpy star-forming galaxy SGASJ111020.0+645950.8 at z=2.481 into a highly magnified giant arc. Using JWST NIRCam imaging, NIRSpec spectroscopy, and archival HST data, we confirm and refine the identification of four multiply imaged background sources, including one newly identified system, and map over 20 luminous regions between each image of the primary arc. Spectroscopy confirms that several previously ambiguous edge "clumps" belong to the main arc at z=2.481. Despite the limited number of strongly lensed sources in the field, the resulting lens model has high precision, owing to the high density of JWST-resolved clump constraints that tightly probe the lensing potential near the giant arc. The model yields a projected lens mass of $M(<250~\mathrm{kpc}) = 1.21^{+0.09}_{-0.04} \times 10^{14}~M_\odot$, an Einstein radius of $θ_\mathrm{E} = 10.8^{+0.3}_{-0.4}~\mathrm{arcsec}$, and a total effective magnification of $μ_\mathrm{tot}=24.2^{+3.4}_{-1.2}$ for the giant arc. Across the arc, individual clump magnifications span $μ_\mathrm{clump}\sim4-19$, with fractional magnification uncertainties of $σ_μ/|μ_{\rm best}|\sim0.03-0.09$. We report a $\sim2-8\times$ improvement in magnification precision over previous models. Ongoing and future analyses of this arc will enable robust measurements of star-forming structure, building on the lensing foundation established here for LEGGOS studies of galaxy growth and feedback during cosmic noon.

AI.result: 投影透镜质量M(<250 kpc)=1.21×10¹⁴ M☉，爱因斯坦半径θ_E=10.8角秒，总放大率μ_tot=24.2；单个团块放大率μ_clump~4-19，放大率分数不确定度σ_μ/|μ_best|~0.03-0.09，精度较此前模型提升约2-8倍。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团产生的强引力透镜效应结合JWST的分辨率，使得在红移z~2-4的星系中研究约10-100 pc尺度上的恒星形成成为可能。作为透镜与星系增长：观测子结构巡天（LEGGOS）的一部分，我们提出了星系团SDSSJ1110+6459（z=0.659）的更新强透镜模型，该星系团将红移z=2.481处的团块状恒星形成星系SGASJ111020.0+645950.8透镜成高度放大的巨弧。利用JWST NIRCam成像、NIRSpec光谱以及存档的HST数据，我们确认并改进了四个多重成像背景源的识别（包括一个新识别的系统），并在主弧的每个像中绘制了超过20个明亮区域。光谱证实，先前几个模糊的边缘“团块”属于红移z=2.481的主弧。尽管该场中强透镜源数量有限，但所得透镜模型具有高精度，这得益于JWST分辨出的团块约束的高密度，这些约束紧密探测了巨弧附近的透镜势。该模型给出的投影透镜质量为$M(<250~\mathrm{kpc}) = 1.21^{+0.09}_{-0.04} \times 10^{14}~M_\odot$，爱因斯坦半径为$θ_\mathrm{E} = 10.8^{+0.3}_{-0.4}~\mathrm{arcsec}$，巨弧的总有效放大率为$μ_\mathrm{tot}=24.2^{+3.4}_{-1.2}$。在弧上，单个团块的放大率范围为$μ_\mathrm{clump}\sim4-19$，放大率分数不确定度为$σ_μ/|μ_{\rm best}|\sim0.03-0.09$。我们报告了相比先前模型约2-8倍的放大率精度提升。对该弧的持续和未来分析将能够对恒星形成结构进行稳健测量，这建立在本文为LEGGOS研究宇宙正午期间的星系增长与反馈所建立的透镜基础之上。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该高精度透镜模型为后续LEGGOS研究提供了坚实基础，将支持对星暴星系中星形成结构、星系增长与反馈过程进行可靠的测量与分析。

title: Extended [CII] gas emission in and around a massive quiescent galaxy at z=7.3
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: We report the discovery of [CII] 158 micron emission in and around the most distant known massive quiescent galaxy RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7 at z = 7.27. Observed with ALMA in band 6, the [CII] line independently confirms the spectroscopic redshift from JWST/NIRSpec spectra at low and medium resolution. The emission extends over an effective radius R_eff,[CII] = 8 +/- 3 kpc, well beyond the compact stellar body traced by JWST/NIRCam (R_eff = 209 (+33/-24) pc), with a significant fraction of approximately 70% of the flux arising from a circumgalactic halo. No dust continuum is detected at rest-frame ~160 micron, setting an upper limit on the infrared luminosity of L_IR < 1.4 x 10^11 Lsun, overall consistent with expectations from rest-frame UV to near-infrared SED modeling under energy balance. Converting the galaxy-scale [CII] emission into cold gas mass, we find log(M_mol/Msun) = 9.53 (+0.32/-0.31) and log(M_HI/Msun) = 9.46-10.34, depending on the assumed calibration and metallicity. Despite being approximately 10x more gas-poor than typical star-forming galaxies at fixed redshift, stellar mass, and [CII] to gas mass conversion, RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7 retains a substantial cold gas reservoir with fractions f_gas >~ 20% and long depletion timescales across most assumptions. The extended [CII] halo carries approximately twice as much gas as the galaxy alone and shows a blueshifted velocity offset consistent with the tentative gas outflow detected in MgII absorption in previous work, suggesting a past episode of AGN-driven gas expulsion possibly linked to the suppression of star formation. The presence of a large gas reservoir in and around a massive quiescent galaxy just 700 Myr after the Big Bang implies that whatever mechanism is suppressing star formation must be remarkably effective at maintaining a low star formation efficiency on ~100 Myr timescales, even in the presence of abundant fuel.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了在已知最遥远的大质量静止星系RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7（红移z=7.27）内部及其周围发现[CII] 158微米发射。使用ALMA波段6观测，[CII]谱线独立确认了来自JWST/NIRSpec低中分辨率光谱的光谱红移。该发射延伸至有效半径R_eff,[CII] = 8 ± 3 kpc，远超JWST/NIRCam追踪的致密恒星主体（R_eff = 209 (+33/-24) pc），其中约70%的通量来自环星系晕。在静止框架约160微米处未探测到尘埃连续谱，为红外光度设定了上限L_IR < 1.4 × 10^11 Lsun，总体上与能量平衡下静止框架紫外到近红外SED建模的预期一致。将星系尺度的[CII]发射转化为冷气体质量，我们得到log(M_mol/Msun) = 9.53 (+0.32/-0.31) 和 log(M_HI/Msun) = 9.46-10.34，具体取决于假定的校准和金属丰度。尽管在固定红移、恒星质量和[CII]到气体质量转换下，其气体贫乏程度约为典型恒星形成星系的10倍，但RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7仍保留了大量的冷气体储库，气体分数f_gas >~ 20%，且在大多数假设下耗散时标较长。延伸的[CII]晕携带的气体量约为星系本身的两倍，并显示出蓝移速度偏移，与先前工作中MgII吸收探测到的疑似气体外流一致，暗示过去可能发生过AGN驱动的气体喷发事件，与恒星形成的抑制有关。在大爆炸后仅7亿年，一个巨大静止星系内部及周围存在大量气体储库，这意味着无论何种机制抑制恒星形成，都必须在约1亿年时标内极其有效地维持低恒星形成效率，即使存在充足的燃料。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该静止星系存在大量冷气体但恒星形成效率极低，表明维持静止状态的机制（可能为AGN驱动的气体外流）能在约1亿年时标内有效抑制恒星形成，即使存在充足的燃料供应。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: ALMA band 6 spectrum of RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7. The yellow and red colors show the total emission, including the spatially extended component, and the central beam extraction that we associate with the galaxy, respectively. The black line and gray shaded area indicate the best-fit Gaussian model to the total emission and its uncertainties. The residuals are shown in the bottom inset, with the gray shaded area indicating the noise RMS. The velocity axis refers to the [C II ] line centroid of the total emission. The dotted gray vertical line indicates the redshift estimate based on JWST grating spectra (Valentino et al., 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7的ALMA波段6光谱。黄色和红色分别显示总发射（包括空间延伸分量）和与星系相关的中心波束提取。黑色线和灰色阴影区域分别表示总发射的最佳拟合高斯模型及其不确定性。残差显示在底部插图中，灰色阴影区域表示噪声RMS。速度轴指总发射的[C II]谱线质心。虚线灰色垂直线表示基于JWST光栅光谱（Valentino等人，2025）的红移估计。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Extended [C II ] emission around RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7. Left panel: the [C II ] emission is indicated by sets of contours: thick dashed yellow lines indicate the total moment-0 map within \(\pm 2\sigma\approx\pm 390\,{km\,s^{-1}}\) around the total [C II ] line centroid, while solid red and blue lines indicate the emission redward ( \([0,250]\,{km\,s^{-1}}\) ) and blueward ( \([-250,0]\,{km\,s^{-1}}\) ) of the systemic redshift. The contours are spaced as multiples of the noise level, starting at \(\pm 3\sigma\) . Negative peaks are marked by dotted lines with the same color scheme. The beam size is shown in the bottom left corner of the cutout. The background image is from JWST/NIRCam with the F444W filter and the green square indicates the center of the stellar emission. The white box marks the pseudoslit used in the position-velocity diagram in the right panel. Right panel: position-velocity diagram. The gray contours are at \(\pm 2\sigma\) significance. The image was smoothed along the velocity axis using a uniform filter of width equal to \(120\,{km\,s^{-1}}\) (i.e., three channels of the datacube as shown in the bottom left corner). Velocity ranges for the red and blue map shown in the left panel are also highlighted.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7周围的延伸[C II]发射。左图：[C II]发射由等高线组表示：粗虚线黄色线表示总[C II]谱线质心附近\(\pm 2\sigma\approx\pm 390\,{km\,s^{-1}}\)范围内的总矩0图，实线红色和蓝色线分别表示系统红移红侧（\([0,250]\,{km\,s^{-1}}\)）和蓝侧（\([-250,0]\,{km\,s^{-1}}\)）的发射。等高线间隔为噪声水平的倍数，从\(\pm 3\sigma\)开始。负峰值用相同颜色方案的虚线标记。波束大小显示在剪裁图的左下角。背景图像来自JWST/NIRCam的F444W滤光片，绿色方块表示恒星发射的中心。白色方框标记右图位置-速度图中使用的伪狭缝。右图：位置-速度图。灰色等高线表示\(\pm 2\sigma\)显著性。图像沿速度轴使用宽度等于\(120\,{km\,s^{-1}}\)（即数据立方体的三个通道，如左下角所示）的均匀滤波器进行了平滑。左图中红色和蓝色图的速度范围也已突出显示。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: [C II ] line and continuum flux measurements, luminosity estimates, and derived quantities of RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7. 2 2 2 All quantities are measured from the \(0\hbox to0.0pt{.\hss}{\arcsec}8\) -tapered datacube. (†) Quantities measured from the spectrum extracted from the peak of the stellar emission in the JWST/F444W image. \(L_{IR}\) and \(M_{dust}\) are derived at fixed \(T_{dust}=40\,{K}\) and \(\beta_{IR}=1.8\) (Section 3.1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7的[C II]谱线和连续谱通量测量、光度估计及导出量。所有量均从\(0\hbox to0.0pt{.\hss}{\arcsec}8\)锥化数据立方体测量。（†）从JWST/F444W图像中恒星发射峰值提取的光谱测量的量。\(L_{IR}\)和\(M_{dust}\)在固定\(T_{dust}=40\,{K}\)和\(\beta_{IR}=1.8\)下导出（第3.1节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Morphological modeling of RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7 in the visibility domain. Top panel: The real part of the visibilities (black points) binned to \(20\,{k}\lambda\) ( \(\lambda=1.305\,{mm}\) ). The best-fit Gaussian model is shown in red. The reduced chi-squared value is reported in the bottom left corner. Bottom panel: Residual S/N after subtracting the best-fit model ([data \(-\) model]/error; black points). The orange curve shows the cumulative variance-weighted mean of the residuals. Dark and light gray shaded areas indicate \(1-\) and \(2\sigma\) levels.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7在可见度域的形态建模。上图：按\(20\,{k}\lambda\)（\(\lambda=1.305\,{mm}\)）分箱的可见度实部（黑点）。最佳拟合高斯模型以红色显示。约化卡方值报告在左下角。下图：减去最佳拟合模型后的残差信噪比（[数据\(-\)模型]/误差；黑点）。橙色曲线显示残差的累积方差加权平均值。深色和浅色灰色阴影区域分别表示\(1-\)和\(2\sigma\)水平。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Maps of the [C II ] emission and best-fit model of RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7 in the image plane. From left to right: untapered and tapered ( \({HWHM}_{uv}\approx 114\,{k\lambda}\) ) moment-0 dirty maps ( \(\pm 390\,{km\,s^{-1}}\) ), the best-fit Gaussian model, and residuals with data contours superimposed. White contours indicate \(\pm[2+n]\sigma\) levels, where \(\sigma\) is the noise RMS and \(n\geq 0\) is an integer. The synthesized beam FWHM is shown in the bottom left corner. The green square marks the peak of the stellar emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7在图像平面的[C II]发射和最佳拟合模型图。从左到右：未锥化和锥化（\({HWHM}_{uv}\approx 114\,{k\lambda}\)）的矩0脏图（\(\pm 390\,{km\,s^{-1}}\)）、最佳拟合高斯模型以及叠加数据等高线的残差。白色等高线表示\(\pm[2+n]\sigma\)水平，其中\(\sigma\)是噪声RMS，\(n\geq 0\)是整数。合成波束FWHM显示在左下角。绿色方块标记恒星发射的峰值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: [C II ], dust, and UV emission of high-redshift galaxies. Top panel: [C II ] luminosity as a function of rest-frame UV magnitude. Bottom panel: ratio of [C II ] luminosity to the underlying dust continuum at \(160\,\mu\) m rest-frame, as a function of rest-frame UV magnitude. In both panels, the filled and empty stars indicate the [C II ] emission associated with the RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7 galaxy and the total emission including the extended halo, respectively; pentagons the QGs from D’Eugenio et al. ( 2026 ) , circles and squares the SFGs from ALPINE and REBELS, hexagons the low-luminosity QSOs from SHELLQs, and downward triangles upper limits from ALPINE. Symbols are color-coded by redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：高红移星系的[C II]、尘埃和紫外发射。上图：[C II]光度作为静止框架紫外星等的函数。下图：[C II]光度与静止框架\(160\,\mu\)m处底层尘埃连续谱的比值，作为静止框架紫外星等的函数。在两图中，实心和空心星形分别表示与RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7星系相关的[C II]发射和包括延伸晕的总发射；五边形表示D’Eugenio等人（2026）的静止星系，圆形和方形表示ALPINE和REBELS的恒星形成星系，六边形表示SHELLQs的低光度类星体，向下三角形表示ALPINE的上限。符号按红移着色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: \(L_{[CII]}\) –total SFR relation. The gray line and shaded area show the \(L_{[CII]}\) –SFR relation and its scatter from Schaerer et al. ( 2020 ) . Large filled symbols indicate the SFR estimates for RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7: stars mark the values for \(SFR_{100}\) from the low- and high- \(Z\) solutions of the spectrophotometric modeling in Weibel et al. ( 2025 ) ; the leftward triangle shows the upper limit from rest-frame optical lines emission. \(L_{[CII]}\) refers to the galaxy component only, excluding the extended emission. Remaining symbols are as in Figure 5 , color-coded by redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：\(L_{[CII]}\) –总恒星形成率关系。灰色线和阴影区域显示Schaerer等人（2020）的\(L_{[CII]}\) –恒星形成率关系及其弥散。大型填充符号表示RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7的恒星形成率估计：星形标记来自Weibel等人（2025）分光光度建模的低和高\(Z\)解的\(SFR_{100}\)值；向左三角形显示来自静止框架光学谱线发射的上限。\(L_{[CII]}\)仅指星系分量，不包括延伸发射。其余符号如图5所示，按红移着色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Gas fractions of quenched systems as a function of redshift. Purple, blue, and orange symbols indicate estimates based on [C II ], CO, and dust, respectively; symbol shapes indicate the samples of QGs described in the legend. The gray solid line and shaded band show the locus of a main-sequence galaxy with stellar mass equal to that of RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7 ( \(M_{\star}=10^{10.2}\,M_{\odot}\) ) parameterized as in Liu et al. ( 2019 ) ; the dotted gray line shows the same trend for \(M_{\star}=10^{11}\,M_{\odot}\) for a better comparison with more massive low-redshift quiescent galaxies. For RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7, the star marks \(M_{gas}=M_{mol}({[CII]})\) calibrated as in Zanella et al. ( 2018 ) ; diamonds mark \(M_{gas}=M_{HI}({[CII]})\) following Heintz et al. ( 2021 ) for the two stellar metallicity solutions of Weibel et al. ( 2025 ) ; orange circles mark upper limits on \(M_{gas}({dust})\) for the same two solutions. Empty purple circles and hexagons indicate ALPINE and REBELS star-forming galaxies assuming \(M_{gas}=M_{mol}({[CII]})\) as in Zanella et al. ( 2018 ) . The compilation of molecular \(f_{gas}\) in the literature for quiescent galaxies is from D’Eugenio et al. ( 2026 ) and references therein.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：淬灭系统气体分数随红移的变化。紫色、蓝色和橙色符号分别表示基于[C II]、CO和尘埃的估计；符号形状表示图例中描述的静止星系样本。灰色实线和阴影带表示恒星质量等于RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7（\(M_{\star}=10^{10.2}\,M_{\odot}\)）的主序星系轨迹，参数化如Liu等人（2019）；虚线灰色线显示\(M_{\star}=10^{11}\,M_{\odot}\)的相同趋势，以便与更大质量的低红移静止星系进行更好比较。对于RUBIES-UDS-QG-z7，星形标记按Zanella等人（2018）校准的\(M_{gas}=M_{mol}({[CII]})\)；菱形标记按Heintz等人（2021）对Weibel等人（2025）两种恒星金属丰度解给出的\(M_{gas}=M_{HI}({[CII]})\)；橙色圆圈标记相同两种解的\(M_{gas}({dust})\)上限。空心紫色圆圈和六边形表示ALPINE和REBELS恒星形成星系，假设\(M_{gas}=M_{mol}({[CII]})\)如Zanella等人（2018）。文献中静止星系分子\(f_{gas}\)的汇编来自D’Eugenio等人（2026）及其参考文献。

title: Little Red Dots on FIRE: Exploring the formation and observational signatures of ultra-compact early galaxies
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs) are compact sources with broad Balmer lines, Balmer breaks, anomalous UV emission, rising red continuum, and uncertain origin. We use FIRE cosmological simulations, 3D dust radiative transfer, and synthetic emission-line data cubes to test whether ultra-compact early galaxies can reproduce LRD-like observables without invoking AGN. In progenitors of present-day group halos ($M_{\rm halo} > 10^{13.5} M_{\odot}$), we identify transient phases at $z \approx 4-8$ lasting $\sim 150-400$ Myr in which strong dissipative inflows build massive ($M_{\star} \sim 10^{8.5}-10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$), UV-bright ($-23 \lesssim M_{\rm UV} \lesssim -20$), ultra-compact ($R_{\rm eff} < 300$ pc) stellar cores with extreme circular velocity ($V_{\rm circ} > 500$ km s$^{-1}$) and consistent with several LRD properties: strong Balmer breaks ($F_ν(4200{\rm Å})/F_ν(3500{\rm Å}) \sim 2$); blue UV beta slopes ($β_{\rm UV} \approx -1.25$); dust masses; ALMA non-detections; and Balmer-line widths up to $\sim 1500$ km s$^{-1}$ broadened by galaxy-scale dynamics. However, stellar emission and host-galaxy kinematics alone do not reproduce the red rest-optical continuum, more extreme Balmer breaks ($\gtrsim 2.5$) and line widths ($\gtrsim 2000$ km s$^{-1}$), or the broad-Balmer/narrow-forbidden-line signature of broad-line AGN. The same ultra-compact conditions efficiently fuel central BHs, suggesting a hybrid stellar+AGN scenario in which compact stars explain the UV continuum, Balmer break, and intermediate line widths while AGN supply the red optical continuum and more extreme line properties. With halo masses $M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{11-12.5} M_\odot$ and comoving abundance $\sim 2 \times 10^{-5} {\rm cMpc}^{-3}$ (for $\sim 20\%$ duty-cycle at $z \approx 4-8$), ultra-compact galaxies can contribute to the massive, bright LRD population.

AI.tldr: 本文利用FIRE宇宙学模拟和3D尘埃辐射传输，研究了“小红点”（LRDs）的起源。发现早期宇宙中极端致密的恒星核（半径<300 pc）可以在不依赖活动星系核（AGN）的情况下再现部分LRD观测特征（如巴尔默跳变、UV光谱斜率等），但无法解释红色光学连续谱和更极端的谱线宽度，因此提出恒星+AGN混合模型：致密恒星核负责UV和中等宽度谱线，AGN贡献红色连续谱和极端谱线。
AI.motivation: 小红点（LRDs）是JWST发现的一类致密高红移源，具有宽巴尔默线、巴尔默跳变、异常UV发射和上升的红色连续谱，但其物理起源（恒星主导还是AGN主导）尚不明确。
AI.method: 使用FIRE宇宙学模拟、3D尘埃辐射传输和合成发射线数据立方体，模拟极早期致密星系在z≈4-8的演化，并与LRD观测特征进行对比。
AI.result: 在z≈4-8、持续约150-400 Myr的暂态阶段，形成了质量10^8.5-10^10.5 M⊙、UV亮度-23到-20 mag、有效半径<300 pc的致密恒星核，圆速度>500 km/s。这些结构可以解释巴尔默跳变（~2）、UVβ斜率（~-1.25）、尘埃质量、ALMA非探测和~1500 km/s的巴尔默线宽，但无法解释更极端的巴尔默跳变（>2.5）、线宽（>2000 km/s）和红色光学连续谱。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是紧凑的源，具有宽的巴尔默线、巴尔默跳变、异常的紫外发射、上升的红色连续谱以及不确定的起源。我们利用FIRE宇宙学模拟、三维尘埃辐射传输和合成发射线数据立方体，测试超紧凑早期星系是否能在不涉及活动星系核（AGN）的情况下再现类似LRD的可观测特征。在现今群级暗晕（$M_{\rm halo} > 10^{13.5} M_{\odot}$）的前身中，我们识别出在$z \approx 4-8$处持续约$\sim 150-400$ Myr的瞬态阶段，其中强烈的耗散内流构建了质量巨大（$M_{\star} \sim 10^{8.5}-10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$）、紫外明亮（$-23 \lesssim M_{\rm UV} \lesssim -20$）、超紧凑（$R_{\rm eff} < 300$ pc）的恒星核，具有极端环向速度（$V_{\rm circ} > 500$ km s$^{-1}$），并与若干LRD性质一致：强巴尔默跳变（$F_ν(4200{\rm Å})/F_ν(3500{\rm Å}) \sim 2$）；蓝色紫外β斜率（$β_{\rm UV} \approx -1.25$）；尘埃质量；ALMA未探测；以及由星系尺度动力学展宽的巴尔默线宽度高达$\sim 1500$ km s$^{-1}$。然而，仅凭恒星发射和宿主星系运动学无法再现红色静止光学连续谱、更极端的巴尔默跳变（$\gtrsim 2.5$）和线宽（$\gtrsim 2000$ km s$^{-1}$），或宽巴尔默/窄禁线标志的宽线AGN特征。相同的超紧凑条件有效地为中央黑洞提供燃料，暗示一种恒星+AGN混合情景，其中致密恒星解释了紫外连续谱、巴尔默跳变和中等线宽，而AGN提供了红色光学连续谱和更极端的谱线特性。暗晕质量$M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{11-12.5} M_\odot$且共动丰度$\sim 2 \times 10^{-5} {\rm cMpc}^{-3}$（在$z \approx 4-8$处占空比约$\sim 20\%$）的超紧凑星系可以贡献于质量巨大、明亮的LRD种群。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：致密早期星系可以贡献部分LRD种群，但完全解释LRD需要恒星+AGN混合模型：致密恒星核解释UV、巴尔默跳变和中等线宽，AGN提供红色连续谱和极端谱线特性。

title: Little Red and Blue Dots: AGN-excited narrow lines, Lyman-$α$ emission, and resemblance to standard quasars
summary: We present an analysis of a sample of 36 Little Red and Blue Dots (LRDs and LBDs) at $2.26<z<7.89$, identified by JWST in the GOODS fields. While both categories are selected to have broad Balmer lines, both of them are extremely X-ray weak. Both classes share the same location on various diagnostic diagrams, consistent with AGN excitation (with some deviations which can be ascribed to low metallicity), although their weak HeII emission suggests a generally softer ionizing spectrum than ordinary AGN. LRDs display Ly$α$ emission stronger than normal star-forming galaxies, and with a broad component consistent with the broad component of H$α$. Overall, these findings indicate that LRDs and LBDs are both powered by growing black holes and their ionizing radiation escapes to ionize the surrounding interstellar medium (ISM). The broad Balmer lines ($Hα_b$ and $Hβ_b$) have different apparent properties: LBDs have EW(H$α_b$) and $Hα_b/Hβ_b$ broadly consistent with normal AGN, while LRDs have higher values of both quantities, although still in the tail of the quasars distribution. LRD models in which a gas envelope completely encases the black hole, are inconsistent with these results -- these scenarios need modification to include clumpiness, or a (classical) equatorial geometry, letting ionizing photons reach the ISM. The different broad Balmer properties imply that LBDs cannot simply be LRDs with more galaxy contribution. Scenarios in which LRDs are simply dust-obscured LBDs seem broadly consistent with the observations. Finally, these results indicate that LRDs' bolometric luminosities estimated assuming isotropic emission and complete covering by the absorber are inadequate. The few X-ray-detected LRDs suggest no deviation from the standard AGN bolometric corrections, once absorption is accounted for.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了36个小红点和蓝点（LRDs和LBDs）的JWST样本，发现它们都由黑洞驱动，具有宽巴尔默线但极弱的X射线辐射。研究指出LRD的完全包裹黑洞的气体包层模型与观测不符，需引入团块性或赤道几何结构。LRD可能是尘埃遮蔽的LBD，且其各向同性辐射假设下的光度估计不准确。
AI.motivation: JWST在GOODS天区发现了大量高红移的小红点和蓝点，其本质（是活动星系核还是恒星形成星系）尚不清楚。本文旨在通过分析它们的宽线、X射线、电离线等特征，厘清这两类天体的物理本质和相互关系。
AI.method: 选取36个红移2.26<z<7.89的LRD和LBD样本，分析其宽巴尔默线（Hα_b和Hβ_b）、X射线辐射、Lyα发射线、HeII发射线等观测特征，并在多种诊断图上比较它们与正常AGN和恒星形成星系的位置。
AI.result: 两类天体都极弱X射线，在诊断图上位于AGN激发区；LRD的Lyα发射强于恒星形成星系，且有与Hα宽成分一致的宽成分；LBD的宽线性质接近正常AGN，而LRD的EW(Hα_b)和Hα_b/Hβ_b更高。完全包裹黑洞的模型与观测矛盾。
AI.conclusion: LRD和LBD都由增长中的黑洞驱动，电离辐射能逃逸到周围星际介质；LRD不可能是被更多星系成分污染的LBD，但可能是尘埃遮蔽的LBD；LRD的各向同性光度估计需要修正。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们分析了由JWST在GOODS天区识别出的36个小红点和蓝点（LRDs和LBDs）样本，其红移范围为$2.26<z<7.89$。虽然这两类天体均被选为具有宽巴尔默线，但它们都极其缺乏X射线辐射。两者在各种诊断图上占据相同位置，与活动星系核（AGN）激发一致（部分偏差可归因于低金属丰度），但其较弱的HeII发射表明其电离光谱通常比普通AGN更软。LRDs显示出比正常恒星形成星系更强的Ly$α$发射，并且其宽成分与H$α$的宽成分一致。总体而言，这些发现表明LRDs和LBDs均由增长中的黑洞驱动，其电离辐射能够逃逸并电离周围的星际介质（ISM）。宽巴尔默线（$Hα_b$和$Hβ_b$）具有不同的表观特性：LBDs的EW(H$α_b$)和$Hα_b/Hβ_b$与正常AGN大致一致，而LRDs的这两个量值均更高，尽管仍处于类星体分布的尾部。气体包层完全包裹黑洞的LRD模型与这些结果不一致——这些情景需要修改以包含团块结构或（经典）赤道几何结构，使电离光子能够到达ISM。不同的宽巴尔默线特性意味着LBDs不能简单地被视为具有更多星系成分贡献的LRDs。LRDs仅仅是尘埃遮蔽的LBDs这一情景与观测大致相符。最后，这些结果表明，基于各向同性发射和吸收体完全覆盖假设的LRD热光度估计是不充分的。少数X射线探测到的LRDs表明，在考虑吸收后，其与标准AGN热光度的修正并无偏差。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：LRD和LBD都由增长中的黑洞驱动，电离辐射能逃逸到周围星际介质；LRD不可能是被更多星系成分污染的LBD，但可能是尘埃遮蔽的LBD；LRD的各向同性光度估计需要修正。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Rest-frame optical versus UV slope diagram used to select the LRDs and LBDs in our sample. This is based on the diagram presented in Hainline et al. ( 2025 ) and Kocevski et al. ( 2025a ) , and contains only the sources in our sample for which \(|\beta_{opt}|>0\) at \(>2\sigma\) . The red shaded area shows the selection criteria defined in Kocevski et al. ( 2025a ) to select LRDs. The blue shaded region shows the selection criteria for LBDs. The grey symbols are likely classical reddened AGN. The blue circles represent individual LBDs and the red squares individual X-ray undetected LRDs, while the crosses represent X-ray detected sources. The sources that fail the compactness criteria (defined in Section 2 ) are highlighted with a black circle, and the white symbols are tentative broad line AGN (as explained at the end of Section 4.1). The red star shows the slopes measured from the mean prism stack of LRDs and the blue diamond shows the stack of LBDs (Fig. 2 ). The two large symbols marked with an ‘R’ indicate the location of the blue and red Rosetta Stones (Juodžbalis et al. , 2024a ; Brazzini et al. , 2026 ) . The grey contours represent non-AGN galaxies from JADES, at \(z>2\) (Hainline et al. , 2025 ) . The orange pentagon represents the composite spectrum of SDSS quasars from Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) with the NIR extension from Glikman et al. ( 2006 ) . There is a third ‘reddened AGN’ (or AGN in a quiescent galaxy) which lies at \(\beta_{UV}=6\) so does not appear on this figure.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：用于选择我们样本中LRD和LBD的静止系光学与紫外斜率图。此图基于Hainline等人（2025）和Kocevski等人（2025a）提出的图，仅包含我们样本中在\(>2\sigma\)水平上满足\(|\beta_{opt}|>0\)的源。红色阴影区域显示Kocevski等人（2025a）定义的用于选择LRD的选择标准。蓝色阴影区域显示LBD的选择标准。灰色符号可能是经典的红化AGN。蓝色圆圈代表单个LBD，红色方块代表单个X射线未探测到的LRD，而叉号代表X射线探测到的源。未通过致密性标准（在第2节中定义）的源用黑色圆圈突出显示，白色符号是暂定的宽线AGN（如第4.1节末尾所述）。红色星号显示从LRD的平均棱镜堆叠中测得的斜率，蓝色菱形显示LBD的堆叠（图2）。标有‘R’的两个大符号表示蓝色和红色罗塞塔石碑的位置（Juodžbalis等人，2024a；Brazzini等人，2026）。灰色等高线代表来自JADES、红移\(z>2\)的非AGN星系（Hainline等人，2025）。橙色五边形代表来自Vanden Berk等人（2001）的SDSS类星体复合光谱，并包含Glikman等人（2006）的近红外延伸。存在第三个‘红化AGN’（或处于宁静星系中的AGN），其\(\beta_{UV}=6\)，因此未出现在此图中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Prism stacks of the LRDs and LBDs in our sample. Both are mean stacks which have been normalised by the flux between 5200 and 5700 Å. The top panel shows the number of sources contributing to the stack at each wavelength. The yellow spectrum shows the composite spectrum of SDSS quasars from Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) with the NIR extension from Glikman et al. ( 2006 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们样本中LRD和LBD的棱镜堆叠光谱。两者均为平均堆叠，并通过5200至5700 Å之间的流量进行了归一化。顶部面板显示了在每个波长处对堆叠有贡献的源数量。黄色光谱显示了来自Vanden Berk等人（2001）的SDSS类星体复合光谱，并包含Glikman等人（2006）的近红外延伸。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Bolometric to X-ray (2-10 keV rest frame) luminosity ratio as a function of bolometric luminosity for our sample of LRD and LBD. We also plot the same values for a sample of local optical/UV-selected quasars (Lusso et al. , 2020 ) , the best fit correlation for a similar sample, with 1- \(\sigma\) dispersion (Duras et al. , 2020 ) , and a sample of local Narrow-Line Seyfert 1s from Vasudevan and Fabian 2007 . The green circles are local super-Eddington accreting massive black holes (SEAMBHs) studied in Tortosa et al. ( 2026 ) . Symbols and colours refer to different properties as shown in the figure legend. We also include the ‘Saguaro’ which is an LRD studied in Rinaldi et al. ( 2025b ) with a faint X-ray detection (shown as the red circle in this figure). Note that the large star and diamond are the values for the stacks derived using the first method described in Section 7 , while the smaller star and diamond are the values derived for the stacks using the second method. The two large symbols marked with an ‘R’ indicate the location of the blue and red Rosetta Stones. The red crosses are the X-ray detected LRDs (where the one with a square is from Hviding et al. 2026 ), while the blue cross is a broad line AGN matching the color requirements for LBD, but which is X-ray detected.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于我们样本中的LRD和LBD，热光度与X射线（2-10 keV静止系）光度之比作为热光度的函数。我们还绘制了本地光学/紫外选择的类星体样本（Lusso等人，2020）的相同值、类似样本的最佳拟合相关性及其1-\(\sigma\)弥散（Duras等人，2020），以及来自Vasudevan和Fabian 2007的本地窄线Seyfert 1星系样本。绿色圆圈是Tortosa等人（2026）研究的本地超爱丁顿吸积大质量黑洞（SEAMBHs）。符号和颜色代表图中图例所示的不同属性。我们还包含了‘Saguaro’，这是Rinaldi等人（2025b）研究的一个具有微弱X射线探测的LRD（在此图中显示为红色圆圈）。请注意，大的星号和菱形是使用第7节中描述的第一种方法推导出的堆叠值，而较小的星号和菱形是使用第二种方法推导出的堆叠值。标有‘R’的两个大符号表示蓝色和红色罗塞塔石碑的位置。红色叉号是X射线探测到的LRD（其中带方形的来自Hviding等人2026），而蓝色叉号是一个满足LBD颜色要求但被X射线探测到的宽线AGN。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Rest-frame stacked Chandra thumbnails of the LRD (top) and LBD (bottom) samples, combining the CDF-S and CDF-N fields, in the three rest-frame bands used for the stacking analysis: 1–5 keV (left), 5–7.25 keV (centre), and 10–30 keV (right). Green circles mark the \(R=2^{\prime\prime}\) source extraction aperture and the \(5^{\prime\prime}\) – \(10^{\prime\prime}\) background annulus. Colour bars give the counts scale of each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：LRD（顶部）和LBD（底部）样本的静止系堆叠钱德拉缩略图，结合了CDF-S和CDF-N天区，显示在用于堆叠分析的三个静止系波段：1–5 keV（左）、5–7.25 keV（中）和10–30 keV（右）。绿色圆圈标记了\(R=2^{\prime\prime}\)的源提取孔径和\(5^{\prime\prime}\) – \(10^{\prime\prime}\)的背景环。颜色条给出了每个面板的计数标度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Chandra spectrum of the X-ray detected LRD, with the main spectral properties resulting from the fit. Column densities ( \(N_{H}\) ) are calculated assuming Solar abundances.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：X射线探测到的LRD的钱德拉光谱，显示了拟合得出的主要光谱特性。柱密度（\(N_{H}\)）是在假设太阳丰度的情况下计算的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 10 : [O iii ]λ5007 EW as a function of Balmer break strength for the sources in our sample.The colours and markers are as in Fig. 1 . There is a weak anticorrelation between [O iii ]λ5007 EW and Balmer break strength, which may simply be induced by the fact that the optical continuum is used on both axes. LBDs seem to be broadly overlapping with LRDs.
figures.caption_zh: 图10：我们样本中源的[O iii]λ5007等值宽度作为巴尔默跳变强度的函数。颜色和标记与图1相同。[O iii]λ5007等值宽度与巴尔默跳变强度之间存在微弱的反相关，这可能仅仅是由于两个轴都使用了光学连续谱。LBDs似乎与LRDs大致重叠。

figures.caption_en: Figure 11 : [O iii ]λ5007 EW (Å) as a function of luminosity (erg/s) at \(\sim 5100\) Å (rest frame) for the individual sources in our sample. The colours and markers are as in Fig. 1 . The solid data points are those with [O iii ]λ5007 EW measured using the observed continuum, while the hollow darker red points are those measured using the UV continuum model extrapolated to 5007Å. The blue contours are JADES galaxies at 2<z<8 (excluding type 1 and 2 AGN) and the purple contours are SDSS quasars (Wu and Shen, 2022 ) . The LRDs and LBDs in our sample are consistent with both JADES galaxies and the low-luminosity part of the Baldwin relation of the SDSS quasars. However, the EW([OIII]) of both LBDs and LRDs (especially those inferred from the UV extrapolation – hollow squares) is generally higher than observed in normal star forming galaxies at the same luminosity.
figures.caption_zh: 图11：我们样本中单个源的[O iii]λ5007等值宽度（Å）作为\(\sim 5100\) Å（静止系）处光度（erg/s）的函数。颜色和标记与图1相同。实心数据点是使用观测到的连续谱测量[O iii]λ5007等值宽度的源，而空心的深红色点是使用外推到5007Å的紫外连续谱模型测量的源。蓝色等高线是JADES中红移2<z<8的星系（排除1型和2型AGN），紫色等高线是SDSS类星体（Wu and Shen, 2022）。我们样本中的LRD和LBD与JADES星系以及SDSS类星体Baldwin关系的低光度部分均一致。然而，LBD和LRD（尤其是那些从紫外外推推断出的——空心方块）的EW([OIII])通常高于相同光度下正常恒星形成星系中观测到的值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 12 : The distribution of broad Hα EWs for the LRDs and LBDs in our sample, compared to the distribution of SDSS quasars which are presented by the purple solid line. The red part of the bar represents the fraction of LRDs and the blue part represents the fraction of LBDs. The red line shows the EW of the red Rosetta stone, and the blur line represents the blue Rosetta stone. We find that LRDs and LBDs tend to have higher EWs than standard AGNs which has been found in other works (Maiolino et al. , 2025 ) . We also find that LRDs have higher EWs compared to LBDs which is discussed further in Fig. 13 .
figures.caption_zh: 图12：我们样本中LRD和LBD的宽Hα等值宽度分布，与紫色实线表示的SDSS类星体分布进行比较。条形图的红色部分代表LRD的比例，蓝色部分代表LBD的比例。红线显示了红色罗塞塔石碑的等值宽度，蓝线代表蓝色罗塞塔石碑。我们发现LRD和LBD倾向于具有比标准AGN更高的等值宽度，这已在其他工作中发现（Maiolino等人，2025）。我们还发现LRD比LBD具有更高的等值宽度，这将在图13中进一步讨论。

title: LEGGOS III: Mapping Star Formation and Dust in Gravitationally Lensed Galaxies with $\textit{SUMAC}$, a UMAP and Clustering Framework
comment: 4 pages, 1 figure. In prep. for submission to RNAAS
summary: Strong gravitational lensing combined with JWST's spatio-spectral resolution enables resolved studies of star-forming regions in $z\sim$ 2-4 galaxies, but identifying and characterizing such regions in lensed integral-field and multi-band data remains a manual, observer-dependent process. We present $\texttt{SUMAC}$ (Software for the Uniform Manifold Approximation of Clumps), an unsupervised learning pipeline that segments JWST imaging and spectroscopy at the "spaxel" level by combining $\texttt{UMAP}$-based manifold embedding with $\texttt{HDBSCAN}$ density clustering applied to spectral energy distributions/spectra. We demonstrate the pipeline on JWST/NIRSpec PRISM IFS observations of the lensed galaxy SGAS111020.0+645950.8 at $z = 2.481$, recovering six physically distinct stellar/nebular populations. The cluster median SEDs separate cleanly on the presence and strength of H$β$+[OIII], H$α$+[NII], $β_{NUV}$ slope, Balmer break strength, and the Balmer decrement, with bluer clusters tracing unobscured star-forming regions and progressively redder clusters tracing dusty star-forming regions.

AI.tldr: SUMAC是一个基于UMAP和HDBSCAN的无监督学习管道，能够在单像素级别自动分割JWST成像与光谱数据，识别透镜星系中的星族区域，并在SGAS111020.0+645950.8星系中成功恢复出六个物理上不同的恒星/星云群体。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜结合JWST的高分辨率数据虽能解析高红移星系中的恒星形成区，但当前对这些透镜数据的识别和表征仍依赖人工操作，缺乏自动化、客观的流程。
AI.method: 提出SUMAC管道，将UMAP流形嵌入与HDBSCAN密度聚类相结合，对JWST成像和光谱数据在单像素（spaxel）级别进行无监督聚类分割。
AI.result: 在透镜星系SGAS111020.0+645950.8（z=2.481）的JWST/NIRSpec PRISM IFS数据上，成功恢复出六个物理上不同的星族，其聚类中值SED在Hβ+[OIII]、Hα+[NII]、NUV斜率、Balmer跃变强度和Balmer减缩等特征上清晰分离。
AI.conclusion: SUMAC能够自动、客观地识别透镜星系中不同物理性质的恒星形成区域，蓝色星团对应无遮蔽的恒星形成区，红色星团对应被尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成区。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜结合JWST的空间-光谱分辨率，使得对红移z~2-4星系中恒星形成区域的分辨研究成为可能，但在透镜积分场和多波段数据中识别和表征这些区域仍然是一个依赖观测者的手动过程。我们提出了SUMAC（星团均匀流形逼近软件），这是一个无监督学习流程，通过结合基于UMAP的流形嵌入与应用于光谱能量分布/光谱的HDBSCAN密度聚类，在“空间像素”级别分割JWST成像和光谱数据。我们在JWST/NIRSpec PRISM IFS对透镜星系SGAS111020.0+645950.8（z=2.481）的观测上演示了该流程，恢复了六个物理上不同的恒星/星云族群。星团中值SED在Hβ+[OIII]、Hα+[NII]、β_NUV斜率、巴尔默跳变强度和巴尔默减缩的存在和强度上清晰分离，蓝色星团追踪无遮蔽的恒星形成区域，而逐渐变红的星团则追踪被尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成区域。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，SUMAC能够自动、客观地识别透镜星系中不同物理性质的恒星形成区域，蓝色星团对应无遮蔽的恒星形成区，红色星团对应被尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成区。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Example of the primary outputs of SUMAC . Shown here is the UMAP embedding of the IFU spaxels (top left) with the HDBSCAN classified and colored spaxel clusters plotted on arbitrary units. The noise points identified by HDBSCAN are gray and do not belong to a specific cluster. In the middle left is the clusters mapped from UMAP space back to their original location on the lensed arc of SGAS1110, and an RGB composite with the region of the galaxy trained on boxed in orange below that. Cluster 3 is coincident with the green emission regions in the image. The six panels below are the median SEDs of each cluster plotted with uncertainty envelopes which span the 16th–84th percentile of the per-spaxel distribution. The top right figure shows the median Balmer decrement plotted against the median Balmer break for each cluster along with the associated bootstrap uncertainty. For an interactive version of this plot, see the GitHub repository and this YouTube video.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：SUMAC主要输出的示例。此处展示的是IFU空间像素的UMAP嵌入（左上），其中HDBSCAN分类并着色的空间像素星团以任意单位绘制。HDBSCAN识别的噪声点为灰色，不属于特定星团。左中是将星团从UMAP空间映射回其在SGAS1110透镜弧上的原始位置，下方是橙色框内训练星系区域的RGB合成图。星团3与图像中的绿色发射区域重合。下方六个面板是每个星团的中值SED，附有不确定性包络，覆盖每个空间像素分布的16%-84%百分位数。右上图显示了每个星团的中值巴尔默减缩与中值巴尔默跳变的关系，以及相关的自举不确定性。有关此图的交互式版本，请参见GitHub仓库和此YouTube视频。

title: The Lifecycle and Emission Properties of PAHs in Cosmological Hydrodynamic Galaxy Formation Simulations
comment: Submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics; Comments Welcome
summary: We present the first cosmological model for the lifecycle and luminous properties of PAHs in galaxies as they evolve from z=6-->0. We model 40 zoom-in galaxies, coupled with an on-the-fly model for the evolution of dust grains in the ISM. We assume that PAHs are ultrasmall (a < 13 Angstrom) carbonaceous dust grains, and couple this model with single-photon excitation calculations to compute the emergent mid-infrared spectra. (1) If we assume that dust is large upon formation, then PAHs are naturally able to form in situ in the ISM via grain-grain shattering. Interstellar collision velocities increase in low density, diffuse gas in our model; as galaxies evolve, the increase in fractional mass of diffuse gas drives an increase in grain-grain collision velocities and a corresponding rise in the PAH mass fraction (qPAH) from ~5 x 10^{-4} at z~4 to ~10^{-2} at z~0. (2) Increased PAH production in the diffuse ISM results in an inverse relationship between qPAH and the molecular gas fraction. (3) The PAH light-to-mass ratio scales linearly with the radiation field intensity (LPAH/MPAH ~ G_0) but anti-correlates with qPAH, because high-Sigma_SFR galaxies have a denser ISM that suppresses shattering. This means the physical qPAH and observed LPAH/LFIR do not evolve in lockstep. (4) The PAH-metallicity relationship (PZR) arises naturally in this framework: galaxies enrich and grow their diffuse ISM fraction simultaneously, linking rising metallicity to rising qPAH. Our models represent the first to reproduce the PZR observed across z=0-2. (5) The LPAH-SFR and LPAH-M_mol relations emerge from two effects: more massive galaxies have larger PAH reservoirs, and higher-SFR galaxies excite their PAHs more efficiently per unit mass. Taken together, these results suggest that grain-grain shattering in the diffuse ISM is the main driver behind the evolution of cosmic PAH abundances.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了首个从z=6到z=0的星系演化中多环芳烃（PAHs）生命周期与光度的宇宙学模型，提出星际介质中尘埃-尘埃碎裂是PAHs形成的主要机制，成功再现了PAH质量分数演化、PAH-金属丰度关系等关键观测特征。
AI.motivation: 现有模型缺乏对PAHs在宇宙时间尺度上演化的系统描述，尚不清楚PAHs如何在星系中形成、增长及其发光特性随红移的演变规律。
AI.method: 基于40个zoom-in星系模拟，结合星际介质尘埃演化在线模型，将PAHs视为超小碳质尘埃（a<13Å），并耦合单光子激发计算以预测中红外光谱。
AI.result: (1)假设尘埃形成时为大颗粒，PAHs可通过颗粒间碎裂在原位形成；PAH质量分数从z~4的~5×10⁻⁴增至z~0的~10⁻²。(2)PAH增加与分子气体分数呈反比。(3)PAH光质比与辐射场强度线性正相关，但与qPAH反相关。(4)首次再现了z=0-2的PAH-金属丰度关系。(5)L_PAH与恒星形成率及分子质量的关系源于大质量星系具有更大PAH储库，高SFR星系对PAH激发更高效。
AI.conclusion: 星际介质中弥漫气体的尘埃-颗粒碎裂是驱动宇宙PAH丰度演化的主要机制。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于星系演化中多环芳烃（PAHs）的宇宙学模拟，与用户兴趣画像中的‘dust’、‘molecular gas’、‘dense gas’等关键词高度匹配，且作者Desika Narayanan和Jed McKinney在用户核心作者列表中。虽然论文不直接涉及强引力透镜，但PAHs作为星际介质和尘埃的重要成分，与用户关注的高红移星系气体和尘埃研究紧密相关，属于高红移星系物理的延伸。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为PAHs在星系中的生命周期和辐射特性，属于星际介质和尘埃演化领域，与用户兴趣中的‘dust’、‘molecular gas’、‘dense gas’等关键词高度吻合，且涉及高红移星系（z=6→0），与用户对高红移星系动力学和气体的关注一致。
recommendation.method_fit: 采用宇宙学流体动力学模拟（zoom-in模拟）结合尘埃演化模型，方法上与用户兴趣中的星系形成模拟和星际介质研究有重叠，但未涉及引力透镜方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者Desika Narayanan和Jed McKinney在用户核心作者列表中，权重较高，表明用户可能关注其工作。其他作者如Paul Torrey、Karin Sandstrom等也与星系和星际介质领域相关。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了首个宇宙学模型，用于描述星系中多环芳烃（PAHs）从红移z=6到0的演化过程中的生命周期和发光特性。我们对40个放大星系进行了建模，并结合了星际介质（ISM）中尘埃颗粒演化的实时模型。我们假设PAHs是超小（a < 13 埃）的碳质尘埃颗粒，并将该模型与单光子激发计算相结合，以计算产生的中红外光谱。(1) 如果我们假设尘埃在形成时是大的，那么PAHs能够通过颗粒-颗粒碎裂在ISM中原位形成。在我们的模型中，星际碰撞速度在低密度、弥散气体中增加；随着星系的演化，弥散气体质量分数的增加导致颗粒-颗粒碰撞速度增加，相应的PAH质量分数（qPAH）从z~4时的约5 x 10^{-4}上升到z~0时的约10^{-2}。(2) 弥散ISM中PAH产量的增加导致qPAH与分子气体分数呈反比关系。(3) PAH光质比与辐射场强度呈线性关系（LPAH/MPAH ~ G_0），但与qPAH呈反相关，因为高Sigma_SFR的星系具有更致密的ISM，抑制了碎裂。这意味着物理上的qPAH和观测到的LPAH/LFIR并非同步演化。(4) PAH-金属丰度关系（PZR）在此框架中自然产生：星系同时富集并增加其弥散ISM比例，将金属丰度的上升与qPAH的上升联系起来。我们的模型是首个重现z=0-2观测到的PZR的模型。(5) LPAH-SFR和LPAH-M_mol关系源于两个效应：质量更大的星系拥有更大的PAH储库，而SFR更高的星系能更有效地激发其单位质量的PAH。综合这些结果，表明弥散ISM中的颗粒-颗粒碎裂是宇宙PAH丰度演化的主要驱动力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，星际介质中弥漫气体的尘埃-颗粒碎裂是驱动宇宙PAH丰度演化的主要机制。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Physical properties of our model galaxy sample, measured at each galaxy’s final simulation snapshot. Columns are: galaxy name, \(z_{final}\) , \(M_{*}\) , \(M_{gas}\) , \(M_{dust}\) , \(M_{200}\) , metallicity, and SFR.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们模型星系样本的物理性质，在每个星系最终模拟快照处测量。列依次为：星系名称、\(z_{final}\)、\(M_{*}\)、\(M_{gas}\)、\(M_{dust}\)、\(M_{200}\)、金属丰度和SFR。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Mid-infrared spectral decomposition of six representative simulated galaxies at \(z\leq 0.5\) using pahfit . Each panel shows the rest-frame mid-IR SED (grey) along with the pahfit best-fit decomposition. The solid orange curve shows the total model (continuum plus all PAH features). Individual PAH feature families are shown as color-filled regions stacked on the continuum, with the major complexes at \(3.3\) , \(6.2\) , \(7.7\) , \(8.6\) , \(11.3\) , \(12.7\) , and \(17\;\mu\) m indicated in the legend. Vertical dotted lines mark the \(3.3\) , \(6.2\) , \(7.7\) , and \(11.3\;\mu\) m feature positions for reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用pahfit对六个代表性模拟星系在\(z\leq 0.5\)时的中红外光谱分解。每个面板显示静止系中红外SED（灰色）以及pahfit最佳拟合分解。橙色实线显示总模型（连续谱加上所有PAH特征）。各个PAH特征族显示为叠加在连续谱上的彩色填充区域，图例中标出了\(3.3\)、\(6.2\)、\(7.7\)、\(8.6\)、\(11.3\)、\(12.7\)和\(17\;\mu\)m处的主要复合体。垂直虚线标出了\(3.3\)、\(6.2\)、\(7.7\)和\(11.3\;\mu\)m特征位置以供参考。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The evolution of the ISM physical conditions in the vicinity of dust over cosmic time. Top: Violin plot showing the distribution of gas densities for gas particles that neighbor dust particles in our model galaxy sample. Broadly, toward late times ( \(z\lesssim 4\) in this case), the average gas densities decrease with time. The horizontal lines show the median and interquartile ranges. Bottom: \(\rho_{gas}-T_{gas}\) plot for gas particles surrounding dust particles (colored), and all gas particles (dashed contours) at \(z=5,3,0\) for our model galaxy sample. The colors are a heat map representing the density of points.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：宇宙时间内尘埃附近ISM物理条件的演化。上：小提琴图显示我们模型星系样本中与尘埃颗粒相邻的气体颗粒的气体密度分布。总体而言，在晚期（此处为\(z\lesssim 4\)），平均气体密度随时间降低。水平线显示中位数和四分位距。下：我们模型星系样本在\(z=5,3,0\)时，尘埃颗粒周围气体颗粒（彩色）和所有气体颗粒（虚线轮廓）的\(\rho_{gas}-T_{gas}\)图。颜色是表示点密度的热图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Distribution of dust grain collision velocities as a function of redshift for model galaxy sample. The boxenplots show the mass-weighted statistics (weighting by grain mass across size bins). The shaded region shows the range of shattering threshold velocities that we assume for silicates and carbonaceous grains. The increase in grain-grain collision velocity at \(z\lesssim 4\) is a direct consequence of the evolution of ISM physical conditions with redshift (cf. Figure 2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：模型星系样本中尘埃颗粒碰撞速度随红移的分布。箱线图显示质量加权统计（按尺寸区间内的颗粒质量加权）。阴影区域显示我们假设的硅酸盐和碳质颗粒的碎裂阈值速度范围。\(z\lesssim 4\)时颗粒-颗粒碰撞速度的增加是ISM物理条件随红移演化的直接结果（参见图2）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Evolution of normalized grain size distribution for our model sample of galaxies with cosmic time. Galaxies are binned (bottom to top) at \(z 6\) , and all galaxies are shown up top, color coded by redshift. For reference, the Mathis et al. ( 1977 ) grain size distribution is shown in all panels with a thick dash-dot line. Ultrasmall grains that could be considered PAHs are shown in the grey shaded region, though we note that the grain size distribution is shown for all dust (silicates and carbonaceous grains). As the typical interaction velocities increase with decreasing redshift (Figure 3 ), the small-to-large ratio increases with decreasing \(z\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：模型星系样本中归一化颗粒尺寸分布随宇宙时间的演化。星系按红移分组（从下到上）为\(z 6\)，所有星系显示在顶部，按红移着色。作为参考，所有面板中用粗点划线显示了Mathis等人（1977）的颗粒尺寸分布。可被视为PAHs的超小颗粒显示在灰色阴影区域，但我们注意到颗粒尺寸分布是针对所有尘埃（硅酸盐和碳质颗粒）显示的。随着典型相互作用速度随红移降低而增加（图3），小颗粒与大颗粒的比例随\(z\)降低而增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: \(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\) distributions for our model galaxies, binned by redshift. The median of each distribution is shown by a thin dashed vertical line, and the number of galaxies that comprise each distribution is noted by the redshift markers. The median of the distribution follows the cosmic evolution of the gas density (cf. Figure 2 ). As redshift decreases below \(z\sim 4\) , the mass fraction of diffuse ISM increases, resulting in larger dust interaction velocities. This increases the grain-grain shattering events, and therefore fraction of ultrasmall dust grains. The consequence of this is increased \(q_{PAH}\) fractions between \(z\approx 4\rightarrow 0\) , with median values of a few percent at \(z\approx 0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：模型星系按红移分组的\(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\)分布。每个分布的中位数由一条细垂直虚线显示，构成每个分布的星系数量由红移标记标出。分布的中位数遵循气体密度的宇宙演化（参见图2）。当红移降至\(z\sim 4\)以下时，弥散ISM的质量分数增加，导致更大的尘埃相互作用速度。这增加了颗粒-颗粒碎裂事件，从而增加了超小尘埃颗粒的比例。其结果是\(q_{PAH}\)分数在\(z\approx 4\rightarrow 0\)之间增加，在\(z\approx 0\)时中位数为百分之几。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Morphological evolution of the stellar, gas, and PAH surface density distributions for an example galaxy (galaxy 10407) from \(z=4\rightarrow 0\) . Columns show, from left to right, the stellar surface density \(\Sigma_{\star}\) , gas surface density \(\Sigma_{gas}\) , and PAH surface density \(\Sigma_{PAH}\) , while rows correspond to \(z=4.0\) , \(2.0\) , \(0.75\) , and \(0.0\) (top to bottom). Each column shares a common colorbar normalization. At \(z\sim 4\) , the galaxy is compact and gas-rich, with PAHs confined to a small number of sites. By \(z\sim 0\) , the galaxy has developed an extended disk, and PAHs trace the diffuse ISM spiral structure (cf. Figures 2 – 7 ). The global PAH mass fraction \(q_{PAH}\) (annotated in the right column) increases from \(<0.1\%\) at \(z=2\) to \(\sim 4\%\) at \(z=0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：一个示例星系（星系10407）从\(z=4\rightarrow 0\)的恒星、气体和PAH面密度分布的形态演化。列从左到右依次显示恒星面密度\(\Sigma_{\star}\)、气体面密度\(\Sigma_{gas}\)和PAH面密度\(\Sigma_{PAH}\)，而行对应\(z=4.0\)、\(2.0\)、\(0.75\)和\(0.0\)（从上到下）。每列共享一个共同的色标归一化。在\(z\sim 4\)时，星系致密且富含气体，PAHs局限于少量位置。到\(z\sim 0\)时，星系已发展出延展的盘，PAHs示踪了弥散ISM的旋臂结构（参见图2-7）。全局PAH质量分数\(q_{PAH}\)（在右列中标注）从\(z=2\)时的\(<0.1\%\)增加到\(z=0\)时的\(\sim 4\%\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The molecular gas fraction and \(q_{PAH}\) evolve inversely over cosmic time. We show the redshift evolution of the molecular gas fraction \(f_{mol}\) (blue; left axis) and \(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\) (red; right axis) for an example galaxy (galaxy 10407) from our simulation sample. The two quantities track nearly inversely such that when the \(f_{mol}\) is low, \(q_{PAH}\) is elevated owing to increased grain-grain interaction velocities in the diffuse ISM (which increases shattering rates, and therefore, the fraction of PAH grains).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：分子气体分数和\(q_{PAH}\)随宇宙时间反向演化。我们展示了模拟样本中一个示例星系（星系10407）的分子气体分数\(f_{mol}\)（蓝色；左轴）和\(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\)（红色；右轴）随红移的演化。这两个量几乎呈反向追踪关系，即当\(f_{mol}\)较低时，由于弥散ISM中颗粒-颗粒相互作用速度增加（这增加了碎裂速率，从而增加了PAH颗粒的比例），\(q_{PAH}\)升高。

title: No hidden monsters: Probing recently-quenched galaxies for obscured AGN with JWST-PRIMER MIRI and NIRCam
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures. Accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: We investigate the role of obscured active galactic nuclei (AGN) in recently quenched post-starburst galaxies (PSBs), using a sample of 65 photometrically selected PSBs in the PRIMER-UDS field at $1 < z < 2$. Combining JWST/MIRI 7.7 $μ$m and 18 $μ$m (F770W and F1800W) imaging with eight NIRCam and three HST/ACS bands, we probe hot dust emission to test for hidden AGN or dust-enshrouded star formation. We find strong differences between the low- and high-mass PSBs. Most high-mass PSBs ($ > 10^{10}\textrm{M}_\odot$) show no excess infrared emission (consistent with the quiescent population), indicating little or no dust-obscured activity, while low-mass PSBs display enhanced emission at 18 $μ$m, which we attribute to residual star formation. AGN template modelling indicates that the absence of mid-IR excess in massive PSBs limits any dust-enshrouded AGN to Eddington ratios of $ < 1\%$. In addition, we show that the F770W--F1800W colour alone is a highly effective diagnostic for separating passive and star-forming galaxies, particularly at high stellar masses. Overall, our results provide further evidence for distinct quenching pathways within the PSB population, and confirm that massive PSBs show no evidence for excess AGN activity relative to older passive galaxies.

AI.motivation: 探究 obscured AGN 在 recently quenched post-starburst galaxies (PSBs) 中的作用，验证大质量PSBs是否存在隐藏的AGN活动。
AI.method: 使用65个在PRIMER-UDS场（1<z<2）的光度选PSB样本，结合JWST/MIRI 7.7μm和18μm成像以及8个NIRCam和3个HST/ACS波段数据，分析热尘埃辐射。
AI.result: 大质量PSBs（>10^10 M⊙）无红外过量，与宁静星系一致；低质量PSBs在18μm有增强发射，归因于残余恒星形成。AGN模板建模显示大质量PSBs中尘埃遮蔽AGN的爱丁顿比<1%。
AI.conclusion: PSB星系存在不同的熄灭路径，大质量PSBs无过量AGN活动证据，F770W-F1800W颜色可有效区分被动与恒星形成星系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用PRIMER-UDS天区中65个光度选择的近期熄灭后星暴星系（PSB）样本，在红移1<z<2范围内研究了遮蔽活动星系核（AGN）的作用。结合JWST/MIRI 7.7 μm和18 μm（F770W和F1800W）成像以及八个NIRCam和三个HST/ACS波段，我们探测热尘埃发射以寻找隐藏的AGN或尘埃包裹的恒星形成。我们发现大质量和小质量PSB之间存在显著差异。大多数大质量PSB（>10^{10} M_⊙）没有表现出过量的红外发射（与宁静星系群一致），表明几乎没有或没有尘埃遮蔽的活动，而小质量PSB在18 μm处表现出增强的发射，我们将其归因于残余的恒星形成。AGN模板建模表明，大质量PSB中缺乏中红外过量将任何尘埃遮蔽的AGN的爱丁顿比限制在<1%。此外，我们表明仅F770W–F1800W颜色就是一种非常有效的诊断工具，用于区分被动星系和恒星形成星系，特别是在高恒星质量下。总体而言，我们的结果为PSB星系群内不同的熄灭路径提供了进一步证据，并确认大质量PSB相对于更老的被动星系没有表现出过量AGN活动的证据。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，PSB星系存在不同的熄灭路径，大质量PSBs无过量AGN活动证据，F770W-F1800W颜色可有效区分被动与恒星形成星系。

They have been shifted to their rest wavelength values based on their redshifts, and normalized to their interpolated 1.6 \(\mu\) m flux value. Each galaxy is coloured by their stellar mass values. The bottom panel compares the median SEDs of each population directly, again with the same normalization. The errors around the median is the standard deviation of the flux values across the population, added in quadrature to the median flux errors.

Galaxies that have X-ray emission detected by Chandra imaging are denoted by yellow stars. At the bottom, median 1 \(\sigma\) colour errors of the populations are shown, corresponding to the massive star-forming, massive quiescent, massive PSB, and low-mass PSB, from left to right.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：与图4等效，但数据来自红移区间\(0.5 MIR excess ，颜色比垂直切割更蓝（左侧）的星系被认为具有中红外非过量。由钱德拉成像探测到X射线发射的星系用黄色星号表示。底部显示了星系群的中位1 \(\sigma\)颜色误差，从左到右分别对应大质量恒星形成星系、大质量宁静星系、大质量PSB和小质量PSB。

title: The EDGE-CALIFA Survey: Star Formation Efficiency and Galaxy Quenching across 62 Main Sequence, Green Valley, and Red Galaxies
comment: 22 pages of main text + 3 appendices. Accepted for publication in ApJ. The GBT-EDGE dataset is available on Zenodo at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20707368
summary: We present GBT-EDGE, a new CO(1-0) survey using the Green Bank Telescope to map 62 nearby (10-140 Mpc) galaxies spanning the star-forming main sequence (SFMS), green valley, and red sequence. The galaxy sample is selected from the CALIFA survey with integral field spectroscopy (IFS), which provides a representative census of local galactic environments. Combining the CO dataset with CALIFA's optical IFS measurements, we derive molecular gas masses, star formation rates (SFR), metallicities, and stellar mass densities to measure star formation efficiency (SFE) and investigate the physical drivers of galaxy quenching. We obtain a median molecular gas depletion time of $2.10^{+2.35}_{-1.31}$, $6.90^{+17.00}_{-3.67}$, and $127.7^{+201.6}_{-113.4}$ Gyr for our sample of main sequence, green valley, and red galaxies, respectively, assuming a Galactic CO-to-H2 conversion factor. By applying various conversion factor prescriptions, we also confirm a systematic decrease of SFE with galaxy's offset below the SFMS, regardless of the adopted prescription. This suggests that the low SFR in some quenched galaxies is primarily driven by suppressed SFE rather than an absence of molecular gas. Our results provide evidence that galaxies below the main sequence can retain substantial molecular gas reservoirs comparable to star-forming galaxies, but they exhibit longer depletion times and form stars inefficiently, possibly due to the combined effects of low gas density and morphological quenching mechanisms.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了GBT-EDGE，一项利用格林班克望远镜对62个邻近（10-140 Mpc）星系进行的新CO(1-0)巡天，这些星系跨越了恒星形成主序（SFMS）、绿谷和红序。该星系样本选自CALIFA巡天，并配有积分场光谱（IFS），提供了本地星系环境的代表性普查。结合CO数据集与CALIFA的光学IFS测量，我们推导出分子气体质量、恒星形成率（SFR）、金属丰度和恒星质量密度，以测量恒星形成效率（SFE）并研究星系熄灭的物理驱动因素。我们得到的中位分子气体消耗时间对于主序、绿谷和红星系样本分别为$2.10^{+2.35}_{-1.31}$、$6.90^{+17.00}_{-3.67}$和$127.7^{+201.6}_{-113.4}$ Gyr，假设采用银河系CO-to-H2转换因子。通过应用各种转换因子方案，我们还确认了SFE随星系低于SFMS的偏移量系统性下降，无论采用何种方案。这表明一些熄灭星系中低SFR主要是由SFE受抑制而非分子气体缺失所致。我们的结果提供了证据，表明低于主序的星系可以保留与恒星形成星系相当的分子气体储库，但它们的消耗时间更长，恒星形成效率低下，可能是由于低气体密度和形态熄灭机制的综合效应。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，低于主序的星系仍保留与恒星形成星系相当的分子气体储库，但其恒星形成效率受到抑制，可能由低气体密度和形态熄灭机制共同导致。

title: Clumpy Disk, Interloper, or Merger? Nature of a Distant Galaxy Pair at 5 kpc Projected Separation
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures, accepted for publication in The Astrophysical Journal
summary: We present the morphological, photometric, and spectroscopic properties of a z ~ 1 galaxy, "lil gal", serendipitously detected in JWST Mid Infrared Instrument (MIRI) images of nearby galaxy VV 340. In the MIRI F560W and F770W images, we identify what appears to be a spiral galaxy with a central bulge. However, in the F1500W image, a second peak appears ~0.7" northwest (NW) from the central bulge, calling into question the nature of this source as a clumpy disk, a high-redshift interloper, or a galaxy merger. Multi-band analyses of the three MIRI and four Hubble Space Telescope (HST) images suggest a photometric redshift of ~0.92. Spectroscopic analyses of data from the Keck Near-Infrared Echellette Spectrometer (NIRES) reveal two sets of [N II] and H-alpha emission lines corresponding to the two observed sources. A redshift of z = 0.9248 is identified for the NW companion. Fainter emission lines are identified from the underlying galaxy at z = 0.9225, suggesting a merging galaxy pair at a projected separation of ~5 kpc. From the emission line ratios from Keck NIRES and Keck Cosmic Web Imager (KCWI) spectra, we classify the system as hosting regions of active star formation, likely attributed to merger-induced starburst activity. The results demonstrate the necessity of resolved, spectroscopic follow-up analyses of galaxies found in deep JWST images to disentangle the role of galaxy mergers from clumpy disk galaxies at z ~ 1 to cosmic noon and beyond.

AI.tldr: JWST MIRI数据中发现了一个z~1的星系"lil gal"，原本看起来是旋涡星系，但更长的波长观测显示它实际上是一对正在合并的星系（z=0.9248和z=0.9225），相距约5 kpc，并伴有合并引发的星暴活动。
AI.motivation: 区分z~1附近星系的本质是团块盘、高红移闯入者还是星系合并，以及证明JWST深场数据中分辨率的后续光谱跟进分析的必要性。
AI.method: 利用JWST MIRI三个波段（F560W、F770W、F1500W）和HST四个波段的多波段测光数据确定测光红移；使用Keck NIRES和KCWI光谱仪进行光谱分析，识别发射线并测量红移和线比。
AI.result: F1500W图像中在中心星系西北方向0.7"处出现第二个峰值；光谱分析识别出两组[N II]和H-alpha发射线，对应两个源，红移分别为z=0.9248（NW伴星系）和z=0.9225（主星系），投影距离约5 kpc；发射线比表明系统存在活跃的恒星形成区，可能是合并触发的星暴活动。
AI.conclusion: 该目标实际上是一对合并星系而非单一旋涡星系，强调了在JWST深场数据中必须进行分辨率的、光谱学上的后续分析，才能准确区分z~1到宇宙正午时期星系合并与团块盘星系的作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了在z~1处的一个星系“lil gal”的形态、测光和光谱特性，该星系是在JWST中红外仪器（MIRI）对邻近星系VV 340的成像中偶然探测到的。在MIRI F560W和F770W图像中，我们识别出一个看似具有中央核球的旋涡星系。然而，在F1500W图像中，中央核球西北方向约0.7角秒处出现第二个峰值，这质疑了该源作为团块盘、高红移闯入者或星系合并的本质。对三个MIRI和四个哈勃空间望远镜（HST）图像的多波段分析表明其测光红移约为0.92。对来自凯克近红外阶梯光栅光谱仪（NIRES）数据的光谱分析揭示了对应于两个观测源的两组[N II]和H-α发射线。西北伴星系的红移确定为z=0.9248。从背景星系（z=0.9225）中识别出较弱的发射线，表明这是一个投影间距约5 kpc的合并星系对。根据凯克NIRES和凯克宇宙网成像仪（KCWI）光谱的发射线比值，我们将该系统归类为拥有活跃恒星形成区域，这很可能归因于合并引发的星暴活动。这些结果证明了必须对JWST深场图像中发现的星系进行高分辨率、光谱学后续分析，以厘清在z~1到宇宙正午及更远时期星系合并与团块盘星系各自的作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该目标实际上是一对合并星系而非单一旋涡星系，强调了在JWST深场数据中必须进行分辨率的、光谱学上的后续分析，才能准确区分z~1到宇宙正午时期星系合并与团块盘星系的作用。

title: Euclid Quick Data Release (Q1): The geometry of dark matter halos from extragalactic streams
comment: Euclid Key Paper. Submitted to A&A. Paper: 21 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. Total with Appendices: 40 pages, 21 figures, 2 tables
summary: Wide-field surveys like Euclid mark a new era of extragalactic stellar stream studies. With a large number of streams, it is now possible to constrain the dark matter halos of galaxies in a cosmological volume and draw comparisons to theoretical expectations for the geometry of dark matter halos. This study combines Euclid imaging with visual detection and segmentation annotations to analyse streams. We use projected stream morphologies to constrain the shape and centre-of-mass position (CoM) of each host galaxy's potential, jointly probing baryonic and dark matter distributions. These inferences complement weak lensing methods, with sensitivity to halo profile and geometry on sub-virial scales. The method enables both stacked, population-level constraints on halo flattening and CoM position, and constraints on these quantities for individual halos. We also present a novel method for transforming segmentation maps of stellar streams into smooth, curvature-preserving tracks optimised for fast and robust dynamical inference. This approach enables rapid modelling of stream morphology, supports a statistically rigorous combination of constraints across multiple streams within a single galaxy, and enables joint inference across galactic hosts. From our study of 13 galaxies with prominent tidal streams, we find agreement with spherical halos, albeit a mild preference for flattening with $q = 0.95^{+0.05}_{-0.10}$ at 68\% confidence. This is promising early agreement with $Λ$CDM predictions. With thousands more discovered streams expected across \Euclid's mission, our programme will enable precise measurements of halo shapes and CoM positions across large samples and redshifts, offering constraints on the geometry of dark matter halos.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 像Euclid这样的宽场巡天标志着河外星系恒星流研究的新时代。借助大量的恒星流，现在可以在宇宙学尺度上约束星系的暗物质晕，并将其与暗物质晕几何形状的理论预期进行比较。本研究结合Euclid成像与视觉检测和分割标注来分析恒星流。我们利用投影的恒星流形态来约束每个宿主星系势的形状和质心位置，共同探测重子和暗物质分布。这些推断补充了弱引力透镜方法，对亚维里尔尺度上的晕轮廓和几何形状具有敏感性。该方法能够实现对晕扁平度和质心位置的叠加式、群体级约束，以及对单个晕的这些量的约束。我们还提出了一种新方法，将恒星流的分割图转换为平滑、保持曲率的轨迹，以优化快速且稳健的动力学推断。这种方法能够快速模拟流形态，支持对单个星系内多个流的约束进行统计上严格的组合，并实现跨宿主星系的联合推断。通过对13个具有显著潮汐流的星系的研究，我们发现与球对称晕一致，尽管在68%置信度下轻微倾向于扁平化，扁平度$q = 0.95^{+0.05}_{-0.10}$。这与ΛCDM预测的早期一致性令人鼓舞。随着Euclid任务预计发现数千个更多的流，我们的项目将能够在大样本和红移范围内精确测量晕的形状和质心位置，从而对暗物质晕的几何形状提供约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：结果与ΛCDM预测早期一致；随着Euclid发现数千更多流，该方法将实现大样本和红移范围内对暗晕形状和质心位置的精确测量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Top : covariance matrices of the posterior samples of the spline knots. The \(x\) , \(y\) positions are flattened into a single vector with adjacent elements corresponding to the \(x\) and \(y\) coordinates of each knot. The diagonal elements are the variances of the posterior samples, while the off-diagonal elements are the covariances between the knot positions. The band-diagonal structure indicates that the posterior samples are highly correlated, with the largest variances occurring at the end knots. Bottom : sampling from the posterior of the spline knots. The blue lines are the MAP splines with the knot points shown as larger blue circles. The purple regions are the annotations. The blue shaded regions are the 90% confidence intervals from the posterior of the spline knots, showing the uncertainty in the knot positions. Consistent with the covariance matrix, the interior knots are much better constrained than the end points. The track and posterior is contained and well aligned with the annotation, shown as the purple region.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：顶部：样条节点后验样本的协方差矩阵。\(x\)、\(y\)位置被展平为一个单一向量，相邻元素对应每个节点的\(x\)和\(y\)坐标。对角线元素是后验样本的方差，而非对角线元素是节点位置之间的协方差。带状对角线结构表明后验样本高度相关，最大方差出现在末端节点。底部：从样条节点后验中采样。蓝线是最大后验样条，节点点显示为较大的蓝色圆圈。紫色区域是标注。蓝色阴影区域是样条节点后验的90%置信区间，显示了节点位置的不确定性。与协方差矩阵一致，内部节点的约束比端点好得多。轨迹和后验包含在标注内并与标注良好对齐，如紫色区域所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Geometry of the potential. This visualisation represents how a gravitational potential may be rotated by some angle \(\phi\) in the image plane, and flattened from the original scale \(r_{{s}}\) by rescaling on the (rotated) axis by \(q\) . In addition, a potential may be translated by \(\boldsymbol{\Delta}\) . The grey wire-frame globe represents a spherical potential with perfect symmetry, aligned with the observational axes. The purple wire-frame globe applies these degrees-of-freedom (except any translation). The ‘ \(x\) - \(y\) plane’ represents the image plane, which for the observer sees under a flat-sky approximation, while the \(z\) -axis points toward the observer \(\hat{\mathbf{n}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：势的几何形状。此可视化表示一个引力势如何在图像平面中旋转某个角度\(\phi\)，并通过在（旋转后的）轴上按\(q\)重新缩放，从原始尺度\(r_{{s}}\)变平。此外，一个势可能被平移\(\boldsymbol{\Delta}\)。灰色线框球体表示一个与观测轴对齐的、具有完美对称性的球对称势。紫色线框球体应用了这些自由度（除了任何平移）。‘\(x\)-\(y\)平面’代表图像平面，对于观测者而言是在平面天空近似下看到的，而\(z\)轴指向观测者\(\hat{\mathbf{n}}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Stacked view of galaxies and their streams. Each host galaxy is shown in black-and-white, centred on its CoL position . The stream tracks – fitted ridge lines from our curvature analysis – are overlaid in purple. This visualisation demonstrates the stacking procedure used in our joint analysis: stream tracks from different galaxies are co-aligned as if they orbit a common host. While each system has its own orientation and physical scale, stacking in this way allows us to combine curvature-based constraints across galaxies in a unified likelihood framework (Eq. 12 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：星系及其流的叠加视图。每个宿主星系以黑白显示，以其光心位置为中心。流轨迹——来自我们曲率分析的拟合脊线——以紫色叠加。此可视化展示了我们联合分析中使用的叠加过程：来自不同星系的流轨迹被共同对齐，仿佛它们绕一个共同的宿主运行。虽然每个系统都有自己的方向和物理尺度，但以这种方式叠加使我们能够在一个统一的似然率框架（方程12）中结合跨星系的基于曲率的约束。

The black line is the 50% quantile, with grey shading for surrounding confidence intervals. The data constrains the total CoM position to be close to the luminous centre of the galaxy.

title: Accurate Galaxy Cluster Shear and Mass Calibration for LSST with AnaCal
summary: The observed abundance of galaxy clusters as a function of mass and redshift provides a powerful route to precision cosmology; a key challenge for cluster cosmology is to establish the relation between cluster observables and cluster masses, for which cluster weak gravitational lensing has become the standard tool. A key challenge for cluster lensing is that the shear signal near cluster centers can reach the non-linear regime, where many shear estimators rely on perturbative assumptions that must be explicitly validated. In this work, we use image simulations to test the performance of the shear estimator AnaCal for cluster weak lensing under conditions representative of the 10-year LSST data. We find that AnaCal recovers the input shear with minimal bias even at mildly high shear, $|g|\sim 0.15$. We discover a radially decreasing mean shear response as seen previously in data, driven by the radial dependence of the convergence field; if unmodeled, this effect can bias shear inference. We also find a positive shear-estimation bias at third order in the reduced shear near the cluster center. However, because only a small fraction of galaxies lie in the high-shear regime and those measurements are further downweighted by the covariance matrix, the resulting mean cluster-mass bias for cluster lens masses in $[10^{14} M_\odot, 10^{15} M_\odot]$ -- adopting a scale cut of $\sim 0.2$ Mpc at $z=0.25$ -- is $0.24 \pm 0.26\%$ under ideal settings. These results demonstrate that AnaCal is a robust tool for accurate cluster mass calibration in the LSST era.

AI.tldr: 本文通过图像模拟验证了剪切估计器AnaCal在LSST十年数据条件下对星系团弱引力透镜测量的性能，发现其在中等剪切（|g|~0.15）下偏差极小，并揭示了径向递减的平均剪切响应和第三阶正偏差，但整体团质量偏差仅为0.24±0.26%，证明AnaCal是LSST时代可靠的团质量校准工具。
AI.motivation: 星系团丰度是精密宇宙学的重要途径，而团弱引力透镜是建立团观测量与团质量之间关系的关键工具。然而，靠近团中心的剪切信号可能进入非线性区域，许多剪切估计器依赖的微扰假设需要明确验证，因此需要检验AnaCal在此条件下的性能。
AI.method: 使用图像模拟，在代表10年LSST数据的条件下，测试剪切估计器AnaCal在星系团弱引力透镜中的表现，分析剪切偏差、径向响应及高阶效应。
AI.result: AnaCal在中等剪切（|g|~0.15）下恢复输入剪切偏差极小；发现径向递减的平均剪切响应（由会聚场径向依赖驱动）和团中心附近第三阶正剪切估计偏差；但在理想条件下，采用~0.2 Mpc尺度截断后，团质量偏差仅为0.24±0.26%。
AI.conclusion: AnaCal是LSST时代进行精确团质量校准的稳健工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 观测到的星系团丰度随质量和红移的变化为精确宇宙学提供了一条强有力的途径；团宇宙学的一个关键挑战是建立团观测量与团质量之间的关系，为此，团弱引力透镜已成为标准工具。团透镜的一个关键挑战是，团中心附近的剪切信号可能达到非线性区域，许多剪切估计器依赖于必须明确验证的微扰假设。在这项工作中，我们使用图像模拟来测试剪切估计器AnaCal在代表十年LSST数据的条件下进行团弱引力透镜的性能。我们发现，即使在中等高剪切（$|g|\sim 0.15$）下，AnaCal也能以最小偏差恢复输入剪切。我们发现了一个径向递减的平均剪切响应，这与之前在数据中观察到的情况一致，该响应由会聚场的径向依赖性驱动；如果未建模，这种效应可能会使剪切推断产生偏差。我们还发现，在团中心附近，约化剪切的三阶项存在正的剪切估计偏差。然而，由于只有一小部分星系位于高剪切区域，并且这些测量值被协方差矩阵进一步降低权重，在理想条件下，采用约$0.2$ Mpc（在$z=0.25$处）的尺度截断，团透镜质量在$[10^{14} M_\odot, 10^{15} M_\odot]$范围内的平均团质量偏差为$0.24 \pm 0.26\%$。这些结果表明，AnaCal是LSST时代进行精确团质量校准的稳健工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，AnaCal是LSST时代进行精确团质量校准的稳健工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Shear estimation results for the cluster lens of masses \(10^{14}M_{\odot}\) , \(2\times 10^{14}M_{\odot}\) , \(5\times 10^{14}M_{\odot}\) , and \(10^{15}M_{\odot}\) . AnaCal can recover input true shear up to \(g\sim 0.15\) . The error bar is from the forecast covariance for the 10-year LSST survey. We show the \(p\) -value in the last row of the figure. There is a positive shear bias that we will quantify in Section III.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：质量为\(10^{14}M_{\odot}\)、\(2\times 10^{14}M_{\odot}\)、\(5\times 10^{14}M_{\odot}\)和\(10^{15}M_{\odot}\)的透镜团的剪切估计结果。AnaCal能够恢复高达\(g\sim 0.15\)的输入真实剪切。误差棒来自十年LSST巡天的预测协方差。我们在图的最后一行显示了\(p\)值。存在一个正的剪切偏差，我们将在第三节B部分进行量化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Measured and the best-fit shear bias for all radial bins of the simulated cluster lenses. The transparent points are measured shear bias, the solid circles with error bars are the binned mean of the measured shear bias, and the purple solid line is the best fit shear bias with Equation 29 . The gray-shaded region is the SRD requirement for shear bias \(|m|<0.3\%\) . The best-fit parameters are printed in the lower right corner. The multiplicative bias is consistent with 0, and there is a positive third-order shear bias term.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：所有模拟透镜团径向分箱的测量剪切偏差及最佳拟合。透明点为测量的剪切偏差，带误差棒的实心圆为测量剪切偏差的分箱平均值，紫色实线为使用方程29的最佳拟合剪切偏差。灰色阴影区域是剪切偏差\(|m|<0.3\%\)的SRD要求。最佳拟合参数打印在右下角。乘性偏差与0一致，并且存在一个正的三阶剪切偏差项。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Source galaxy response as a function of the distance to cluster lens center. Near the cluster center, the mean response is significantly larger than in the cluster outskirts. We also observe a mass dependence of the response trend. We show that the mean response is correlated with mean convergence \(\kappa\) in the angular bin in Figure 6 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：源星系响应随到透镜团中心距离的变化。在团中心附近，平均响应显著大于团外围。我们还观察到响应趋势的质量依赖性。我们将在图6中展示平均响应与角分箱中平均会聚\(\kappa\)的相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Mean AnaCal tangential shear response in angular bins as a function of mean convergence. The mean shear response increases monotonically with the input convergence. We also test that when the simulations have no input \(\kappa\) , this trend goes away. Therefore, we think the shear response trend in S. Grandis et al. ( 2024 ) is caused by the magnification effect. The red solid line is a linear fit of the mean response as a function of convergence.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：角分箱中的平均AnaCal切向剪切响应作为平均会聚的函数。平均剪切响应随输入会聚单调增加。我们还测试了当模拟中没有输入\(\kappa\)时，这种趋势消失。因此，我们认为S. Grandis等人（2024）中的剪切响应趋势是由放大效应引起的。红色实线是平均响应作为会聚函数的线性拟合。

title: Revisiting the 'Lensing is Low' Problem with UNIONS
comment: 21 article pages, 19 figures, submitted to MNRAS
summary: We present new measurements of the galaxy-galaxy lensing (GGL) signal around Baryon Oscillation Spectroscopic Survey (BOSS) CMASS galaxies using background sources from the Ultraviolet Near-Infrared Optical Northern Survey (UNIONS). With high-quality imaging of background sources and a survey overlap of approximately 2650 square degrees, we obtain precise large-scale GGL measurements. Building on these new measurements, we revisit the so-called 'lensing is low' problem, wherein galaxy-halo connection models calibrated on galaxy clustering (GC) data over-predict the GGL signal by 20-40% assuming CMB-based cosmological parameters. We model the galaxy-halo connection using a halo occupation distribution (HOD), and perform joint fits to both GGL and GC signals across a wide range of scales, as well as a GC-only fit. In contrast to previous work, we do not find a significant 'lensing is low' effect in the CMASS sample, although the best joint fits are achieved by decreasing the amplitude of the matter power spectrum slightly relative to the Planck cosmological parameters. Overall, we find that two models describe our observables similarly well: one where HOD and cosmological parameters are free, and one where HOD, cosmological, and feedback parameters are free. Importantly, we emphasise the role of large scales in constraining the lensing is low effect, shifting the narrative away from an exclusively small-scale issue.

AI.tldr: 利用UNIONS巡天的背景星系数据，对BOSS CMASS星系的星系-星系引力透镜信号进行了新测量，发现之前报告的‘透镜效应过低’问题在CMASS样本中并不显著，通过联合拟合星系成团和引力透镜数据，两种模型（自由HOD和宇宙学参数，或自由HOD、宇宙学和反馈参数）都能很好描述观测数据，并强调大尺度在约束该效应中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 重新审视所谓‘透镜效应过低’问题，即基于星系成团数据校准的星系-晕连接模型在CMB宇宙学参数下会高估引力透镜信号20-40%。
AI.method: 利用UNIONS巡天高质量成像数据（约2650平方度重叠区域）测量GGL信号，采用晕占据分布模型，对GGL和GC信号进行联合拟合以及仅GC拟合。
AI.result: 未发现显著的‘透镜效应过低’现象；最佳联合拟合需要略微降低物质功率谱振幅；两种模型（HOD+宇宙学参数自由，或HOD+宇宙学+反馈参数自由）均能很好描述数据。
AI.conclusion: 大尺度在约束透镜效应过低问题中起关键作用，应将关注点从小尺度转向大尺度分析。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用来自紫外-近红外光学北方巡天（UNIONS）的背景源，呈现了围绕重子振荡光谱巡天（BOSS）CMASS星系的星系-星系引力透镜（GGL）信号的新测量结果。凭借背景源的高质量成像以及约2650平方度的巡天重叠区域，我们获得了精确的大尺度GGL测量。基于这些新测量，我们重新审视了所谓的“透镜效应过低”问题，即基于CMB宇宙学参数、在星系团-星系连接模型校准于星系成团（GC）数据时，GGL信号被高估了20-40%。我们使用晕占据分布（HOD）对星系-晕连接进行建模，并在广泛尺度范围内对GGL和GC信号进行联合拟合，以及仅对GC进行拟合。与先前工作相反，我们在CMASS样本中未发现显著的“透镜效应过低”效应，尽管最佳联合拟合是通过将物质功率谱振幅相对于普朗克宇宙学参数略微降低来实现的。总体而言，我们发现两个模型能同样好地描述我们的观测量：一个是HOD和宇宙学参数自由变化的模型，另一个是HOD、宇宙学和反馈参数自由变化的模型。重要的是，我们强调了大尺度在约束透镜效应过低问题中的作用，将关注点从纯粹的小尺度问题转移开。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，大尺度在约束透镜效应过低问题中起关键作用，应将关注点从小尺度转向大尺度分析。

Purple diamonds show results from L17 using sources from the CFHT Stripe 82 Survey (CS82; Moraes et al. , 2014 ; Chalela et al. , 2018 ) and CFHTLenS. Orange circles with black borders indicate measurements without the boost factor. Only statistical \(1\sigma\) errors are shown in this plot.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：CMASS GGL信号。橙色圆圈显示我们使用UNIONS ShapePipe v1.4.5源星系且未对 \(m\) 偏差进行校正的测量结果。紫色菱形显示L17使用CFHT Stripe 82巡天（CS82；Moraes等人，2014；Chalela等人，2018）和CFHTLenS源的结果。带黑色边框的橙色圆圈表示未使用增因子的测量。此图中仅显示统计 \(1\sigma\) 误差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Correlation matrix computed from the \(\Delta\Sigma\) covariance matrix. By construction, every matrix element must have a value between -1 and 1. Small-scale \(r_{{p}}\) bins are uncorrelated with other bins, as shape noise dominates on these scales. Large-scale bins are mildly correlated due to LSS.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：由 \(\Delta\Sigma\) 协方差矩阵计算得到的相关矩阵。根据构造，每个矩阵元素的值必须在-1到1之间。小尺度 \(r_{{p}}\) 区间与其他区间不相关，因为在这些尺度上形状噪声占主导。大尺度区间由于LSS而呈现轻微相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Correlation matrix computed from the \(w_{{p}}\) covariance matrix. Small-scale \(r_{{p}}\) bins are dominated by shot noise. Large-scale bins are strongly correlated due to LSS.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：由 \(w_{{p}}\) 协方差矩阵计算得到的相关矩阵。小尺度 \(r_{{p}}\) 区间由散粒噪声主导。大尺度区间由于LSS而呈现强相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Gas density profiles for low (solid grey curves) and high (dashed blue curves) feedback. For the low feedback case, \({log}\,M_{{c}}=11.0\) and \(\theta_{{ej}}=0.5\) . For the high feedback case, \({log}\,M_{{c}}=16.0\) and \(\theta_{{ej}}=5.0\) . Larger halo masses are represented by darker curves. The following halo masses were used to generate these curves: \({log}\,(M_{{h}}/h^{-1}\,M_{\odot})=12.0,\,14.0,\,16.0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：低反馈（实心灰色曲线）和高反馈（虚线蓝色曲线）情况下的气体密度轮廓。对于低反馈情况，\({log}\,M_{{c}}=11.0\) 且 \(\theta_{{ej}}=0.5\) 。对于高反馈情况，\({log}\,M_{{c}}=16.0\) 且 \(\theta_{{ej}}=5.0\) 。较大的晕质量由较深的曲线表示。生成这些曲线使用了以下晕质量：\({log}\,(M_{{h}}/h^{-1}\,M_{\odot})=12.0,\,14.0,\,16.0\) 。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Priors and fiducial values used for parameter estimation. ‘Extended HOD’ refers to parameters beyond the standard HOD framework that do not enter the expressions for \(\langle N_{{c}}(M)\rangle\) and \(\langle N_{{s}}(M)\rangle\) . The symbol \(\mathcal{U}({low,high})\) denotes a uniform prior with lower and upper bounds given in parentheses, and \(\mathcal{G}(\mu,\sigma)\) denotes a Gaussian prior with mean \(\mu\) and width \(\sigma\) . Priors on cosmological parameters are set by the Dark Emulator ’s supporting range. Feedback is only incorporated when its corresponding parameters are allowed to vary.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于参数估计的先验和基准值。“扩展HOD”指超出标准HOD框架且不进入 \(\langle N_{{c}}(M)\rangle\) 和 \(\langle N_{{s}}(M)\rangle\) 表达式的参数。符号 \(\mathcal{U}({low,high})\) 表示具有括号内给定下界和上界的均匀先验，\(\mathcal{G}(\mu,\sigma)\) 表示均值为 \(\mu\) 、宽度为 \(\sigma\) 的高斯先验。宇宙学参数的先验由Dark Emulator的支持范围设定。仅当相应参数允许变化时才纳入反馈。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Right panel: 5-parameter HOD fit (blue curve) to the CMASS GC signal, \(w_{{p}}\) (black points). Cosmological parameters are fixed at the Planck 2018 TT,TE,EE+lowE+lensing+BAO values, and extended HOD parameters are set to the fiducial values listed in Table 1 . Left panel: corresponding GGL prediction using the best-fit parameters from the \(w_{{p}}\) fit. Light blue curves show models drawn from the posterior distribution of the \(w_{{p}}\) fit. The \(1\sigma\) error bars include both statistical and systematic uncertainties.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：右面板：对CMASS GC信号 \(w_{{p}}\) （黑点）的5参数HOD拟合（蓝色曲线）。宇宙学参数固定为Planck 2018 TT,TE,EE+lowE+lensing+BAO值，扩展HOD参数设置为表1中列出的基准值。左面板：使用来自 \(w_{{p}}\) 拟合的最佳拟合参数对应的GGL预测。浅蓝色曲线显示从 \(w_{{p}}\) 拟合的后验分布中抽取的模型。\(1\sigma\) 误差棒包括统计和系统不确定性。
